title: Stickman Guys Defense
description:
Stickman Guys Defense is an action-packed tower defense game where you must protect your base from endless waves of enemies! Command a team of brave stickman warriors, place them strategically, and upgrade their abilities to stop the invasion. From archers to sword fighters, build the ultimate defense and survive each level!

Can you defend your land and become the ultimate Stickman commander?

title: Sky Riders
description: Sky Riders is a high-speed casual vehicle driving game. Put your driving skills to the test as you complete several challenging tracks.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Hidden Horrors
description: Ready to explore the haunted Halloween world? Play a hidden object game with 30 Halloween levels. Each level has 6 hidden objects. Find all objects before time runs out. If you need help, use a hint. The game is easy to play. Enjoy colorful Halloween scenes and fun gameplay.

title: Italian Brainrot Bomb - 2Player
description: The dynamite bomb is left in the space hangar. Whoever has it when the time runs out wins the game, because the bomb will explode. Take the bomb from your opponent before the time runs out. When the time ends, the player holding the bomb wins. Grab the bomb to win the game. Be very careful — take the bomb and run, and never let the other player have it.

title: Sweet And Fruity Makeup
description: From luscious watermelon pinks to zesty lemon yellows and tangy orange hues, this game allows you to experiment with a selection of deliciously scented cosmetics. Create stunning looks using fruity lip glosses, shimmering eyeshadows, and blushes that mimic the radiant glow of ripe berries. Let your imagination run wild as you mix and match fruity fragrances, adding a delightful touch of freshness to your final touch. So, get ready to enter a delectable paradise where sweetness meets style!

title: Word Stars
description: Find hidden words and piece together your success. Each puzzle is a step towards mastering the game and expanding your word power. Use hints to keep progressing. From the first word to the last, it’s a race to finish all the levels.

title: Mahjong Solitaire Zodiac
description:
Unwind and challenge your mind with Mahjong Solitaire Zodiac, a timeless puzzle game that blends strategy, focus, and relaxation. 
Match beautifully designed tiles, clear the board, and enjoy a calming gameplay experience anytime, anywhere.
Perfect for both beginners and seasoned players, Mahjong Solitaire Zodiac offers intuitive controls, elegant visuals, and satisfying puzzles that keep you coming back for more.

title: Office Solitaire
description: Office Solitaire is the classic solitaire variant with the objective of collecting all the cards to the top row in suited sequences from ace to king.

title: Tung Tung Sahur in Geometry Dash
description: Join Tung Tung Sahur, the wooden drum-carrying dawn caller, as he bounces and flips through a neon cityscape just before sunrise! Dodge spikes, leap over traps, and time your jumps to the beat of his signature “tung-tung!” calls. In this Geometry Dash–inspired challenge, the streets are alive with glowing gates, speed pads, and tricky gravity flips. Can you drum your way to the end without missing a beat?

title: Murder Mystery
description: Murder Mystery – A fast-paced social deduction game. One player is the killer, another the sheriff, the rest are innocents. Use logic, stealth, and quick decisions to survive or expose the murderer. Perfect for high engagement and multiplayer retention.

title: Froggy Hop
description: Froggy Hop is a fun, physics-based game where you launch a bouncy frog and help it travel across lily pads, turtles, and spring pads while dodging obstacles. Upgrade jump power, height, and bounce to go farther. Unlock cool skins with upgrades, complete daily missions, and aim for the best distance!

title: Mr Bounce
description: Challenge yourself with Mr Bounce, the brain-boosting puzzle game that will test your thinking skills and reflexes. Each level is a new puzzle demanding strategic planning and precise execution. Mr Bounce is more than just a game; it's a mental workout that improves your cognitive abilities.

title: The Flowers: Merge and Sell Bouquets
description: Combine flowers in the relaxing atmosphere of a summer garden and earn coins! Sell your bouquets to customers and clear your garden of unwanted flowers with your pruning shears! Earn more coins than other players to take a place on the leaderboard!

title: Meme Wars
description: MeMe Wars is a strategy battler with US-style Shanhaijing flair. Build a quirky hero lineup with unique roles and stats. Place them on the board for max power, adapt to new foes each stage, and win.

title: Serious Head 2
description:
The adventures of a serious head continue.
Portals open, monsters come out.
Prepare for battle: rebuild your base and upgrade your weapons.
Take your partners to help you and put up a decent resistance!

title: Room Sort Floor Plan
description: Room Sort Floor Plan is a fun creative puzzle game with elements of sorting and design. In this casual game, you’ll go through proper sorting and organization. Designing the perfect layout for every room. Rearrange the floor plan to create your unique home. Each level is a jigsaw puzzle challenge.

title: PaperWar.io
description: There are so many unexplored areas! Conquering them is the key to mastering the game. Expand your territory, eliminate other players who threaten your progress and aim to conquer 100% of each new map. Choose from 9 special skins to express your style!

title: Arrow Escape: Puzzle
description:
“Arrow Escape: Puzzle” is a logic puzzle where arrows block each other, and your goal is to untangle routes and clear the level by choosing the correct move order.

- Short levels you can play in a minute.  
- Focus on logic and move order, not speed.  
- Simple controls: one tap — one move.

title: Through the Wall 3D
description: Through the Wall 3D takes the mind-bending puzzle gameplay of the original Through the Wall to a whole new level with stunning 3D graphics! Test your reflexes, strategy, and flexibility as you contort your character to match a variety of dynamic shapes in a visually immersive world.

title: Slinky Color Sort
description: Slinky Color Sort Puzzle is a relaxing color-therapy game where you sort bright slinky rings into matching stacks. Easy to play yet surprisingly challenging, it’s perfect for calming down while keeping your brain active. Enjoy smooth gameplay, colorful levels, and satisfying logic puzzles.

title: Hexa Sort Trick or Treat
description: Step into a haunted puzzle realm where glowing hexagonal blocks hide within a web of spooky challenges. Your task: sort eerie, color-coded pieces into their rightful places before the shadows close in. With every drag and drop, you’ll sharpen your wits and unravel chillingly clever layouts that grow trickier as you progress. Easy to pick up yet devilishly addictive, this Halloween brain-teaser will keep players of all ages spellbound through hundreds of spooky levels.

title: Draw Climb Race - The Ultimate Hill Climbing Challenge
description: In Draw Climb Race, you draw shapes to climb hills! Any drawing you make will help you climb up steep hills and tricky paths. If you get stuck, just draw a new shape to keep going. Have fun and test your skills in this easy-to-play, addictive game!

title: Gym Simulator - Tycoon
description: Welcome to Gym Simulator - Tycoon, where your business dreams take shape in the world of fitness. In this engaging online game, you'll manage and grow a network of gyms—upgrade your facilities, invest in top-notch equipment, and fine-tune every detail to run smoothly. Whether you're playing on your phone or computer, dive into a game where strategy meets a passion for health. With dynamic gameplay, you'll turn a small operation into a booming fitness brand.

title: Apple Worm
description: Play Apple Worm now. This is a classic puzzle game with simple operation. Brain-burning levels make you love it! Control a cute little worm whose goal is to eat the apple and upgrade. Upgrading allows you to unlock more cute skins. You can also earn rewards by completing challenges. Unlock Auto ATK, Summoning, etc. Enter the snakey mode. Control your worm and eat the apples. Go through the obstacles and enter the portal without any problems!

title: Cheerful Plumber
description: Greetings, young artist. Do you like video games and creativity? Then this game is for you! Color video game characters: a princess, a cheerful plumber, a dragon and others! Choose different colors on the main and secondary palette. Play and color! Take a screenshot and share the result with your friends!

title: Construction Set - 3D Builder
description:
Dive into the fascinating world of 3D constructors and puzzles, where each block is a new step towards creativity and development.
This game invites players to assemble amazing buildings, monuments and characters using more than 200 different bricks.
From simple sets to complex models, each level presents a new challenge and develops attention, logic and spatial thinking.

title: PIZZA PUZZLE
description: Match the same pieces to complete the whole. If you are next to the same piece, the pieces will come together. Game over when there is no place to put pizza.

title: Scala 40
description:
Scala 40 is an Italian card game played with two French decks and jokers.

Players form sets and runs to reach at least 40 points and lay down their first combinations.

Each turn, players draw and discard, trying to optimize their hand and use their own or opponents’ combinations.

The first player to run out of cards wins, while the others add up the points of their remaining cards.

title: Candy Crunch: Sugar Escape
description:
Candy Crunch is a puzzle game where players move colorful block shapes to matching exits.

Each level challenges you to slide and reposition tightly packed blocks with different shapes and colors.

New obstacles appear as you progress, keeping gameplay fresh yet easy to understand. Levels are short, intuitive, and designed for quick, casual sessions.

With smooth controls and relaxing puzzles, Candy Crunch is perfect for logic and problem-solving fans.

title: Molang Match'n Munch
description:
Join Molang and Piu Piu in a heartwarming match-3 adventure! Travel the world, collect rare ingredients, and solve sweet puzzles to save the lost recipes in the Great Book of Flavors before they vanish forever!
Travel through the world's greatest real and imaginary cities, collect rare ingredients, and solve delicious match-3 puzzles to advance and save these culinary treasures!

title: Shape Transforming: Shifting Run
description: Get ready to dive into the exhilarating world of Shape Transforming: Shifting Run, where the power of transformation is in your hands! This game is a thrilling journey across diverse terrains, challenging players to adapt, transform, and conquer. If you have a knack for quick thinking and love dynamic gameplay, this is the perfect game for you! ??

title: Pirate Paradise
description: Pirate Paradise is a fun and relaxing game where you have to match three identical items in a row. Help the pirates sort the items into portals. The difficulty of the game will gradually increase and there will be more and more items.

title: Grandma's Last Stand
description:
Granny is in a hurry to get home and bake some pies. But there's one problem - first she needs to bake a few hundred zombies! They'll be chasing you in cars and motorcycles, they'll have machine guns, rocket launchers, and support drones. But you've got a pretty good arsenal too - from a revolver and machine guns to a minigun and a bazooka. Help Granny get home, roast them all!

INSTRUCTIONS

title: Parking Frenzy
description: Welcome to Parking Frenzy, the ultimate test of precision, planning, and timing! Forget everything you know about driving simulators—this game doesn’t need pedals, steering wheels, or complicated controls. Just swipe your finger, draw the perfect path, and let your car glide into the parking spot. With a stylish 3D look, dynamic environments, and intuitive gameplay, Parking Frenzy delivers a uniquely satisfying experience that’s easy to play and hard to master.

title: Grass Ranch
description: Grass Ranch is a super fun and relaxing casual game that makes you a true ranch grass-mowing master. If you like to complete simple and fun tasks in a cozy environment, then you can't miss this game. In this world of green grass, you will mow grass constantly. Keep mowing the lawn and feed some cute animals.

title: GT Micro Racers
description: GT Micro Racers takes high-speed racing to a whole new scale! Control tiny but powerful GT-style cars as they speed through thrilling outdoor tracks made from everyday household objects. Race across books, cans, and wooden ramps in a sunlit backyard filled with grass, flowers, and playful obstacles. Drift through sharp turns, hit insane jumps, and outmaneuver rivals to claim victory

title: Tiny Baker Ocean Jelly Cake
description: Dive into a world of sweetness with Tiny Baker Ocean Jelly Cake! Create a shimmering ocean-inspired jelly dessert using playful shapes and colors, then decorate it with sea-themed toppings for the perfect underwater delight.

title: Summer Rider 3D
description: Hit the waves in Summer Rider 3D, a sun-soaked surf adventure inspired by high-speed endless runners. Glide over water on a surfboard or jet-ski, collect shimmering starfish, and push your reflexes to the limit as the speed cranks up. With a colorful summer theme and upbeat tropical soundtracks, the game offers endless fun for both solo and 2 player mode!

title: Backgammon Duel
description:
One of the oldest, most played and loved games, the classic backgammon game. 

Also known as Tavli (Greece), Tawla (Egypt), and Takteh (Iranian), but whatever you call it you can download it now and challenge yourself.

title: Color Nuts
description:
Color Nuts is a relaxing and addictive color-matching puzzle game where you place colorful nuts on the board and connect three or more of the same color to clear them.

Plan your moves carefully, complete level objectives, and keep the board from filling up. Easy to learn and hard to master, Color Nuts is the perfect casual puzzle game for fans of match-3, block puzzles, and logic games.

title: Car Jam: Traffic Puzzle
description: Get ready for Car Jam: Traffic Puzzle, the ultimate test of logic and fun! Untangle the traffic, move the cars, and clear the way in this addictive puzzle adventure. With every level, new challenges appear—packed parking lots, tricky buses, and colorful traffic jams waiting for your brainpower. Easy to play, hard to master, and endlessly entertaining.

title: War Robots Battles
description: Enter the future battlefield, and lead your powerful robots in exciting battles. War Robots Battles lets you feel the most exciting robot action. You can attack with powerful weapons and use strategy to win. Choose your robot, equip powerful weapons, and build the strongest combat team. Choose from wind sword, imperial bow, etc.

title: Cat Evolution
description:
Embark on a paws-itively thrilling journey of discovery and creativity in Cat Evolution! Combine adorable cats to unlock hilarious and surprising new species. From cuddly kittens to fantastical hybrids, every merge brings you closer to unveiling the ultimate evolution.

Merge & Unlock Cats Evolutions. 
Build Your Cat Universe!

title: Number Place Travel
description:
Fill the grid with numbers 1–9 so that no same number appears in any row, column, or 3×3 block!
Tap a cell and choose a number to place it.
You can make up to 3 mistakes. Fill in everything correctly to clear the puzzle!

title: The Sorting Mart
description: The Sorting Mart is a store sorting puzzle game that lets you experience the fun of shopping in a store. Rearrange items between shelves to match three identical ones on a shelf, clearing it and letting the upper shelves drop down. Clear entire stacks to shift adjacent shelves and keep matching before time runs out. If you get stuck, use the shuffle button to mix up the shelves and find matches more easily. Challenge your sorting skills as levels become more difficult!

title: Kids Supermarket
description: Welcome to Kids Supermarket, a casual supermarket simulation game for kids. Have you ever gone shopping alone? Feel confused about finding goods among a large number of products? Join Kids Supermarket to elevate your observation and categorization skills. Our diverse and clearly aligned products will make you feel like shopping in a real-life supermarket. Pick up your shopping basket and start your journey in the supermarket.

title: DayCare Tycoon
description: Are you ready to build your dream business empire and be a great babysitter in this money tycoon simulator ? Dive into the world of daycare games and experience the joy of managing your own thriving idle tycoon games. From welcoming adorable babies to creating a safe and happy environment, this game offers everything you need to grow your daycare business into a successful venture.

title: Happy Fluffy Cubes
description: Happy Fluffy Cubes is a bright and fun 3D runner with adorable cube heroes, tricky traps, and a collection system! Choose your Fluffy and fly through levels full of danger: fire, ice, lasers, and spinning saws! Simple one-touch control, but surviving takes focus and reflexes.

title: Idle Landmark Builder
description: Enjoy a casual idle simulation management game in the Idle Landmark - Builder. Here, you'll play the role of a construction tycoon and build world-famous landmarks from scratch. Manage workers to increase speed or your income, hire more workers and build your own construction empire. Build world-famous landmarks such as the Eiffel Tower and the Pyramids, and witness the entire process of their construction.

title: Kitten Never Dies
description: Join an interdimensional adventure to help a lost kitten find its way home! Solve unique challenges in each dimension. Cute, clever, and full of surprises—are you up for the challenge? Play now and test your puzzle-solving skills!

title: Math Lava: Tower Race
description: Test your math skills under pressure in Math Lava: Tower Race, a fast-paced Roblox style web game where quick thinking and accurate answers are your keys to survival. Answer math questions correctly to build blocks beneath you, racing against opponents and rising lava. The faster and more accurate you are, the higher you climb!

title: Royal Pin
description: Royal Pin: King Adventure – A thrilling rescue puzzle game where you save the King, protect the kingdom, and rebuild the castle! Solve tricky pin puzzles, help the queen and princess, and become the ultimate king of this adventure!

title: Zoo Anomaly Simulation
description: Experience a zoo mutation crisis like no other. In Zoo Anomaly Simulation, a peaceful zoo has turned into a nightmare filled with mutated animals, and you’re the only one who can stop the chaos! Enter a first-person shooting experience like no other. Explore the eerie zoo environment, grab your weapons, and fight back against giraffes, zebras, elephants, etc.

title: Manyunya Saving the Princess
description: Welcome to the time when there were knights, magic, farmers, princesses, and generals. Manyunya sets off at the request of the Supreme Lord to save his princess. On the way you will find a whole dangerous adventure, you will come across colorful views, and characters with whom you can communicate and interact, as well as enemies that you will need to defeat at any cost, and save the princess, and complete the task. Interesting voice acting and story will immerse you in this world with your head!

title: Dolphin Couple Underwater Dress Up
description: In Dolphin Couple Underwater Dress Up, you get to explore a vibrant underwater world where two playful dolphins are ready to get glammed up! This charming dress-up game lets you choose outfits, accessories, and fun props to create a stylish underwater look for both dolphins.

title: Cool SuperCars Stunts PvP
description: Skid the wheel of a stunning supercar through 3 awesome game modes and showcase your driving skills. Customize your car according to your taste and drive in style with the roaring engines. Feel the heat in 2 player mode where you go head to head with your friend in 2 amazing game modes! Are you ready to conquer the stunt city? Prove yourself with Two Stunt Racers!

title: Dress Up Run
description: Play Dress Up Runway, the ultimate fashion dress up game where style meets speed! Collect outfits, change looks on the go, and shine in the final runway walk. Perfect for players searching “dress up game,” “fashion game,” or “makeover run,” this stylish challenge lets you become a fashion queen while racing through exciting levels. With princess vibes, outfit makeovers, and endless glam fun, Dress Up Runway is the best free fashion challenge for US teens and students!

title: Match Masters
description: Match Masters is a real-time multiplayer match-3 puzzle game where players compete head-to-head on the same board. Each move requires strategic thinking, as it can benefit both you and your opponent. Utilize unique boosters, participate in tournaments, and climb the global leaderboards in this dynamic and engaging game.

title: Hexa GO!
description: A puzzle game about dropping hexagons from grid. To do this, use a bomb and explode all the tiles nearby! Click on the rotate-button and swap the tiles! And also use other special tiles!

title: sprunki clicker & merge phase 3
description: Sprunki Clicker & Merge: Phase 3 is an exciting rhythm-based idle game where you tap to earn money and unlock new Sprunki creatures! Each Sprunki has a unique musical beat, and as you merge them, you create richer, more dynamic melodies. Grow your collection, upgrade your beats, and become the ultimate Sprunki maestro!

title: Snake Masters
description:
Control a small worm and get ready to reach the other side of the screen. Enjoy a puzzle inspired by the classic Snake, where you must guide the worm to the other side of the apple and escape safely. Will you be smart enough to beat all thirty levels?

Game Features
- Special crawling mechanics.
- Challenge your brain.
- Tons of interesting puzzles.
- Easy controls.

title: CS: Command Snipers
description: "CS: Command Snipers" is an exciting online game where players take on the role of elite snipers who carry out challenging missions in various combat environments. The game combines elements of tactics, precision and teamwork, providing a unique experience for fans of shooters and strategies.

title: Jelly Run 2048
description: Jelly Run 2048 is a challenging casual puzzle game that combines the classic 2048 number merging with exciting parkour gameplay. Guide your jelly block by swiping left or right to connect and disconnect cubes. Merge cubes to get double the number, reaching 2048 or greater. When the jelly block collides with tiles of the same number, they merge into a larger number.

title: Dalgona Game2
description:
There's a cute shape on the dalgona, a snack from the past.
Be careful not to break the shape.
It's complete if you take it out nicely in a pretty way to go!

title: Black Pink Halloween Concert
description: Step into the spooky spotlight with Black Pink Halloween Concert, a thrilling dress-up game where you style the K-Pop superstars for their haunted Halloween performance. Choose from a wide variety of creepy-cute costumes, bold hairstyles, and festive accessories to make the members shine on stage.

title: Jewel Solitaire TriPeaks
description: Rebuild glorious castles in a magical Solitaire adventure! Conquer 200 levels, master 12 variants – from Klondike to Spider – and enjoy fresh mechanics that reinvent the classic. The kingdom’s fate lies in your cards – are you ready to play your way to glory?

title: Rope Rescue! - Unique Puzzle
description: Rope Rescue is a puzzle game with simple controls but a challenging twist. Strategize to save everyone using ropes while dodging tricky traps and obstacles. Stay sharp to overcome each level and claim exciting rewards. With its easy-to-learn mechanics and increasingly complex challenges, this game will keep you hooked as you perfect your rescue skills!

title: Floof My Pet House
description: Welcome to Floof - My Pet House, a casual pet simulation game for kids online. If you love playing with cats and dogs, or are looking for lovely and relaxing games online, do not hesitate to join H5games4u's best animal care game. You will take care of a puppy or a cute cat, feed them, dress them up, and play minigames with them. Earn enough coins to upgrade your pet house and buy more furniture.

title: Emergency Jam
description: As you progress, encounter cars in 8 different colors, adding complexity to your strategy. Use powerful boosters to line up characters by color or shuffle vehicles, clearing the way more efficiently. Test your logic, think fast, and rescue passengers.

title: Agent Zero: Infiltration
description: Step into Agent Zero: Infiltration, the ultimate spy game packed with stealth action and secret missions. Sneak past guards, hack security, and escape dangerous traps while completing thrilling puzzles. Perfect for fans searching “stealth game,” “spy puzzle,” or “escape game,” this free adventure tests your skills and strategy. Outsmart enemies, unlock levels, and prove you’re the top undercover agent in this addictive mission challenge!

title: Color Jam 3D
description:
Color Jam 3D is a fun and relaxing match-and-merge puzzle game! Combine crayons of the same colors  to fill the picture and bring stunning images to life with vibrant colors.
With engaging gameplay and satisfying color-filling mechanics, Color Jam 3D offers a unique blend of puzzle-solving and artistic expression.

title: Katana
description:
It's a first-person Katana game!
Slice all the enemy ninjas into small pieces and save the hostages. Use multiple katana swords and shurikens. Fight epic bosses and complete the levels.

title: Garten Of BanBan 1 Escape
description:
Enter Banban's Kindergarten, and you're sure to make some friends. Explore the mysterious establishment and don't lose your life and sanity. Uncover the horrifying truth behind the place, but be careful, as you are far from alone…

The Banban And Friends Gang:
Banban’s Kindergarten has earned a special place in every kid’s heart. The reason for this is the Banban And Friends Gang, which are the establishment’s mascots and icons. At Banban’s Kindergarten, nobody’s lonely thanks to them!

title: Labubu Merge
description:
Engage, Merge, and Challenge!
Dive into a labubu-matching journey where you collide identical labubu to evolve them and keep them from falling out of the box. But here's the twist: when the same labubus collide, they transform into an entirely new labubu. Can you merge your way to the grand labubu?

title: Winter Tetrix Trails
description:
Winter Tetrix Trails is a relaxing shape-filling puzzle game set in a snowy world.
Drag and place colorful Tetris-style blocks to complete each unique silhouette — think carefully, fit perfectly, and enjoy the magic of winter puzzles!

title: Robbie: Stand on the Right Color!
description:
Welcome to the vibrant world of speed and reaction!
You are about to be tested on your attentiveness and lightning-fast decisions. Your task is simple but tricky: step on the right color before the floor disappears beneath your feet!
Suitable for anyone who loves fast, simple, and addictive games.
Are you ready to help Robbie stand his ground?

title: Block Breaker
description: Embark on a 2D adventure filled with dynamic physics! Break ice blocks, use springs and portals, and launch the character through the air to reach the goal platform. Master the environment and discover all the creative ways to complete each level!"

title: That's My Seat Logic Puzzle
description: Who took my seat? Welcome to the brain-teasing logic puzzle game - That’s My Seat - Logic Puzzle. In this fun and casual game, your mission is to help each quirky character find their perfect seat. Some want to sit by the window, others hate noise, and some need distance from others. Your job is to match everyone’s preferences and place them just right! Each level is a unique puzzle that requires smart seating arrangements.

title: Tap To Color: Painting Book
description:
Unleash your inner artist and paint your stress away with Tap to Color: Painting Book Game! Dive into a vibrant world of color where creating a masterpiece is as simple as a single tap. Forget the mess of crayons and paints; this is the ultimate digital coloring book for all ages.

Find your calm and enter a state of flow as you bring beautiful illustrations to life. It’s the perfect way to relax after a long day, pass the time on your commute,

title: Steam Sorter
description: Take control of a cute robot and get to work sorting industrial garbage! A dynamic puzzle game with a steampunk aesthetic.

title: SWAT Cats Shooter
description: SWAT Cats is an online shooter set in a world where every hero is a battle cat. Ready for purr-fect battle with wild action? Jump in, grab your helmet, and join the fight.

title: Transform Car Battle
description: you'll control a futuristic vehicle that can transform in an instant, speeding down tracks filled with obstacles and enemies. You'll need to swipe flexibly to dodge deadly lasers and traps while collecting energy cubes. At critical moments, tap the screen to transform into battle mode to smash through barriers, or switch forms to pass through special gates. Constantly challenge your reflexes, unlock more cool cars with unique transformation abilities, and set new running records!

title: Truck Stack Colors
description: Get ready for an exciting challenge. Truck Stack Colors takes you into a wonderful world of parkour and truck stacking. In attractive levels, advance by stacking platforms that are the same color as the truck. To master the balancing and stacking skills to build amazing truck towers and climb even higher.

title: Egg Adventure 2
description: Mr Egg comes back, and also a challenge of intelligence and imagination.In egg adventure 2,you need to operate the Eggs to solve various puzzles and get out of the door.Imaginative levels ann funny painting style will take you into a whole ner puzzle world!The key to solving the puzzle may be a word or an action, that can you give it a try？

title: Flick Shot Soccer
description: Flick Shot Soccer is a fun and addictive soccer shooting game where every goal is all about precision. Simply drag to aim and position your shot, then release to kick and send the ball flying into the net. Easy controls make it perfect for anyone to pick up and play, while smart angles and timing are needed to score consistently.

title: Cryptogram
description:
This game is for people who do not just look at letters but see the meaning behind them.
Each phrase hides a thought that can be revealed if you use logic, intuition and persistence.

title: Screw Color Sorting Master
description: Screw Color Sorting Master is a relaxing yet addictive puzzle game! Sort vibrant colored screws onto poles by moving them strategically—same colors must stack together. With simple controls, hundreds of challenging levels, and satisfying visuals, sharpen your brain and become the ultimate sorting master!

title: Ocean Small Hospital Doctor
description: Dive into the exciting world of Ocean Small Hospital - Doctor! This casual and educational game is an absolute blast for animal lovers. In this game, you'll step into the role of a heroic doctor on a submarine-turned-hospital. Your mission? Rescue injured sea animals from the vast ocean depths. As you spot a distressed creature, quickly assemble your medical team and gear.

title: Cubatoria Merge 2048
description:
Welcome to the exciting world of Cubatoria Merge 2048! This game combines elements of the classic 2048 game with a three-dimensional visual design, which makes it unique and exciting.

The game is designed for fans of puzzles, logic games and those who appreciate a creative approach to classic concepts. Cubatoria Merge 2048 promises an exciting immersion in virtual space with the opportunity to enjoy a new visual experience.

title: Monster School vs Siren Head
Animal Royal
description:
"The ultimate player versus player game allows players to engage in battles against their opponents using unique animals."
You'll be challenged to use your wits and strategy to outsmart your opponents and emerge victorious.
Animal Royal is a game that features a wide variety of animals and birds, each with its unique strengths and weaknesses.
Your goal is to protect your meat from being eaten by your opponent's animals while sending your animals to eat as much meat as possible to win the battle.

title: Hexa Block: Honey Cells
description: Dive into the exciting world of logic and shapes. Your task is to fill the field with multi-colored hexagonal blocks, choosing the right combinations. Each level is a new puzzle that requires attention, logic and precise calculation. Exciting gameplay, smooth animation and bright graphics make the gameplay as enjoyable as possible.

title: Fashion Heroes Academy
description: Welcome to the Academy of Fashion Heroines, a place where style and superpowers go hand in hand! Three brave girls entered the academy in order not only to reveal their abilities, but also to create their own unique image. And you will help them in this. Choose outfits for studying, training and super battles. Experiment with makeup and accessories. Let each schoolgirl become a superhero and a style icon at the same time!

title: Survive The Night
description: Are you ready for the most terrifying night of your life? Survive The Night is an intense horror survival game where you’re trapped in a dark, creepy room with something lurking in the shadows. Choose between Normal Mode or Horror Mode to challenge yourself. In Normal Mode, you'll receive more hints, fewer rooms, and standard monsters.

title: Pin master: Screw puzzle quest & brain games
description: Pin master: Screw puzzle quest & brain games challenges your problem-solving skills in a captivating pin puzzle adventure. Strategically tap to unlock screw holes on products, guiding metal plates to fall in the correct sequence. Navigate through intricate mazes of nuts, bolts, and plates. With each level presenting new challenges, immerse yourself in over 100 brain-teasing stages.

title: Brainrot Merge
description:
Merge adorably weird Italian brainrot characters! 
Combine them to unlock rare (and even weirder) species. 
Build the ultimate brainrot paradise!

title: Lost in the Forest
description:
Lost in the forest is a classic adventure game. The protagonist is an airman who ends up in a storm, loses control of his plane and falls into a mysterious forest.
The next day is stuck under a tree and must find a way to break free and solve various puzzles to make it back home safely.

title: Rope Color Sort 3D
description: Rope Color Sort 3D is a creative puzzle game where players need to skillfully sort colorful ropes into their corresponding tubes. The game features beautiful 3D graphics and smooth physics effects, providing players with a relaxing and enjoyable gaming experience.

title: Geometry Vibes X-Arrow
description: Geometry Vibes X Arrow is the newest evolution of the Geometry Vibes series, offering the most refined, competitive and customizable arrow experience so far. The goal is simple but demanding: guide your arrow through dangerous geometric paths, survive increasingly difficult patterns and reach the portal at the end of each route without touching anything.

title: Falling Dummy
description:
Push the dummy off the roof of the tallest building on the construction site and watch it break all its bones. Control the body of the little man as he falls and break as many limbs as possible!

Do you want to relax after a hard day? Then this game is made for you! In this anti-stress game, your main goal is to make the dummy break as many limbs as possible when falling from tall buildings!

title: Wall Hop
description: Every wall has a purpose. Every move is a lesson. Learn the mechanics, feel the flow, and gradually unlock the mental agility needed to navigate increasingly complex challenges.

title: Human Leap Evolution
description: Want a wild evolution adventure from caveman to futuristic super warrior? Human Leap: Evolution is a high-energy action evolution puzzle game where every jump you make shapes your destiny. Choose wisely, evolve rapidly, and battle your enemies with unstoppable power!

title: Stick Rope Hero
description: Are you ready to become a super stickman hero? In Stick Rope Hero, you enter an exciting sandbox world filled with adventures and challenges. Swing around the open city with your powerful rope skills and completing many action tasks.

title: Remove The Blocks
description: Challenging 3D puzzle game where you strategically clear the blocks from complex formations. Click blocks to slide them out in their facing direction, but choose wisely - each move affects the entire structure. With increasingly difficult levels, time-based scoring, and smooth 3D graphics, test your spatial reasoning skills!

title: Car Jam Escape
description: Car Jam Escape is a puzzle game where players clear a crowded parking lot by moving cars in the correct order. Each vehicle can only move forward in the direction it faces, so players must study the layout and plan carefully. The goal is to guide every car out without collisions or blockages. As levels progress, the puzzles become more complex, requiring logical thinking and strategy.

title: Candy Match Puzzle
description:
Dive into a delightful puzzle experience with Candy Puzzle Match, where matching candies is all about tapping! Simply tap on groups of two or more adjacent candies of the same color to clear them from the board. The more candies you clear at once, the higher your score!

Watch the board shift and cascade with every move as you complete deliciously fun objectives. With colorful visuals and satisfying chain reactions, this game is perfect for fans of casual and relaxing puzzle games.

title: School Escape: Obbie Run!
description:
Run Obbie! The teacher will catch up with you and take you straight to the principal! 
You will play as a schoolboy Obbie. After a conflict with the teacher, you need to escape from school. 
The teacher will try to catch up with you at school, you can't let this happen. 
Collect all the keys and escape from school.

title: Octopus Invasion
description: Dive into the ocean and control a hungry octopus on its journey to become the ultimate sea predator! Hunt fish, evolve new abilities, and unlock deeper, more dangerous zones in this addictive underwater adventure.

title: Isometric Escape 2
description: Isometric Escape 2 challenges you to solve a variety of puzzles in uniquely designed isometric rooms. Search for hidden objects and use your logic and memory to unravel the riddles and escape.

title: Summer Maze
description: Summer Maze is a fun summer puzzle game filled with sunshine and bright colors. Guide the ball through the intricate mazes, filling all the space inside. Earn gems, unlock new skins and enjoy simple but addictive gameplay. Perfect for lovers of logic games, arcades and puzzles.

title: Cosmic Dash
description: Jump into Cosmic Dash – an endless space runner full of speed and challenges! Dodge debris, break through asteroids, and gather tokens as you race across the solar system. Use boosts, shrinks, and jumps to chase high scores and experience thrilling interplanetary action!

title: Hidden Object: My Hotel
description: Hidden Objects: My Hotel – A fun hidden-object game where you help a young woman restore her dream hotel! After buying the old building, she needs your help to clean up cluttered rooms, find hidden items, and bring back its lost charm.

title: DOP: Draw One Part
description:
► Can you see what’s missing? 

What a pretty picture, but don’t you get the nagging feeling that something’s not quite right? What’s the final touch that will make the image complete? 

Engage your brain, your imagination and your artistic talents to identify the missing element and add it to the drawing in this delightful puzzle game that will get you thinking and make you smile time and time again.

title: Sweet Haunt 2
description: Guide the ghost to pick up all of the candy and get it to the exit in this Sokoban-like puzzle game. 50 challenging levels to complete. You'll need to pick up candy carefully as depending on how they are carried, the ghost and the candy might not fit into the pathway to the exit. Use bombs strategically to destroy objects the ghost is carrying to be sure you can make it to the exit and not get stuck.

title: 10K
description: You start with 10,000 points and a blank map. Your objective is to retain the highest number of points by pinpointing five cities on the blank map.

title: Space.io
description: Jump into the cockpit of a powerful spaceship and engage in fast-paced 3D space battles! Face off against 9 other enemy ships in an intense dogfight where only the best pilot survives. Shoot down your opponents before they take you out, climb the rankings, and prove you're the ultimate space warrior! Unlock a wide variety of skins to customize your ship and dominate the battlefield in style. Can you claim the top spot?

title: i8 City Driver
description: Get ready to skid the wheels of a stunning supercar through an expansive morning city map! Customize and upgrade your sports car with cool upgradables and become the best driver in the city. Take your dog with you in 3 driving challenges and conquer the missions together. Use nitro to beat slow traffic and beat all speed, stunt and drift triggers spread across the map. Are you ready to show your driving skills? Prove yourself!

title: Blue VS Red
description: Sort blue and red items as fast as you can! Drag or use arrow keys to send each item to the correct zone. Build combos, beat the timer, and earn coins to buy power-ups. Challenge yourself in solo mode or compete against AI bots. How high can you score in 30 seconds?

title: Arrow Sorting
description: Arrow! Sorting Food is a satisfying puzzle adventure where every move changes the board. Tap the arrows to unravel colorful fruit chains, clear paths, and untangle tricky patterns across countless levels. Unlock new visual themes, collect fun skins, and enjoy relaxing yet brain-teasing gameplay that grows more challenging with every stage. Simple to learn, surprisingly addictive to master!

title: Quiz Squid Round
description: Dive into the trivia world with Quiz Squid Game. This unique game puts your knowledge of the popular series to test. Not just about general knowledge, but the devil is in the details of this mysterious and thrilling TV show. Get ready to answer questions about plot twists, characters, and little known facts about-in game universe. Impress your friends with your trivia skills and detailed memory of this cinema spectacle.

title: Alien Chase - Swing and Fly
description: Alien Chase - Swing and Fly is the wildest swinging game in town! Play as a superhero on vacation, caught in the middle of an alien invasion. With nothing but your grappling skills, swing between towering skyscrapers and outrun the relentless alien swarm. It’s fast, it’s frantic, and it’s an endless escape—how far can you swing?

title: Cool Cars: racing at altitude
description:
Cool Cars: racing at altitude is an exciting racing game in which you can buy cars, build your own garage and compete with other players.

Earn points by collecting bonuses on a straight track, compete with other players to complete special tracks against the clock, equip your auto repair shop and collect cool cars!
In the game you will find a large number of cars, exciting tracks, your own garage with purchased cars, the ability to change the environment to suit you and much more.

title: Scary Teacher 3D Returns
description:
Start with the size of a board. A faint sound echoes through the hallway. You freeze, the heart is beating, and the house seems to breathe with you. You are inside the mansion of the old teacher once again.

In the 3D fear teacher, every shadow, every echo matters. Your goal is not to escape; it is mischief. But make an error, and you will become its next goal.

title: Street Traffic Racer
description: Skid the wheels of 6 stunning street cars with modified body kits and drive them through 3 landscape highways without crashing. Show how well you can steer the wheels of these amazing cars with roaring engines and conquer 3 awesome game modes. Use replenishing nitro to overtake slow cars and drive in speed at all times. Customize and upgrade your cars with the best upgrades and get the most out of all the cars. Are you ready to show your driving skills? Prove yourself in Street Traffic Racer

title: The Stone Miner
description: Become the ultimate mining tycoon in The Stone Miner! Drive your powerful mining machine through various fantasy terrains. Crush, collect and smash stones like never before! Steer your mine cart through rocks of different colors and materials and enjoy the exhilarating experience of stone mining. Sell collected stones for gold, and unlock new areas full of rare materials and surprises! Upgrade your vehicle to mine faster and deeper, turning your gear into a true beast!

title: Papas Burger Cook
description:
Cook and travel through amazing burger restaurants, discover delicious recipes, prepare tasty meals, and serve hungry customers in the best burger shop.
This is a crazy cooking game full of fast kitchen action, burger fever, and food madness. Papas Burger Cook - fun cooking simulation game.
Become the ultimate burger chef, master every recipe, and reach the highest rank in this exciting food cooking adventure.

title: Solitaire Mahjong
description: This is Solitaire Mahjong at its best, offering a classic and elegant mahjong experience without any need to rush. Known as one of the top mahjong games, it features a beautifully traditional layout that fans of mahjong puzzles will love. With polished graphics, a soothing soundtrack, and no timer, Solitaire Mahjong invites you to enjoy each move at a relaxed pace, focusing purely on the pleasure of the game.

title: Jungle Solitaire
description: Jungle Spider Solitaire is an adaptation of the classic card game Spider Solitaire with a jungle theme. It is optimized for short games and encourages strategic planning of moves with an original system of collecting diamonds.

title: Math Obby
description: Combine your math skills with parkour prowess in Math Obby, an engaging Roblox experience that challenges players with arithmetic problems amidst obstacle courses. Navigate through stages that test both your agility and your knowledge of addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division. Earn badges as you progress and showcase your mastery in this educational adventure.

title: Math Master
description: Unleash your inner math whiz! Math Master turns numbers into art—solve fun math problems to unlock drawing tools, sketch colorful shapes, and bring numerical puzzles to life. Perfect for learners and creativity lovers alike!

title: Stick vs Monster School 2
description:
Stick vs Monster School 2 is now fighting zombies!

He's in for fights and epic battles in the world during the zombie apocalypse!

Game features:
- Make cool shot
- Buy guns
- Fight zombies and bosses!

Did you like the game "Stick vs Monster School 2"? - Then write a review and play all our games about stickmen.

title: Find Hidden Cats
description: Explore charming black-and-white scenes inspired by iconic European cities in this relaxing yet addictive hidden object game. Every corner is packed with clever details and playful surprises - can you spot all 20 mischievous cats hiding in plain sight? Test your observation skills, take your time, and enjoy the satisfying thrill of discovering each well-hidden feline!

title: Ninja Wars: Battle Simulator
description: Ninja Wars: Battle Simulator is a 3D strategy battle game where planning is the key to victory. Build your army of Swordsmen, Spearmen, and Archers, analyze enemy formations, and lead your ninja forces to triumph across challenging levels.

title: Arrow Count Master
description: Arrow Count Master is a fast and satisfying runner where every choice changes your firepower. Swipe to move and choose between gates that add, subtract, multiply, or boost your arrows. Build the biggest arrow count possible while avoiding penalties and obstacles along the way.

title: Witchy and the Puzzle Adventures
description: Help the brave Witch to pass all the puzzling tests and find all the seals to shelter them in her cozy forest house. Kittens are lost in the forest, which is full of various traps and dangers, you need to help the Witch to pass all the tests and find all the seals.

title: Rooftop Run
description: Run, jump, and slide over rooftops in this fast-paced parkour game! Dodge obstacles, smash through barriers, and escape from enemies as you race through exciting levels.

title: Darts Jam
description:
This is a casual game of shooting balloons with darts.

When all the darts are pulled out, the board will also fall. When all the boards fall, the game is won.

The game is easy and simple to play, and the difficulty is getting stronger and stronger, which is challenging

title: PuzzleJam
description:
Puzzle Jam is a bright and fun puzzle game where you merge jellies of the same color to clear the board and complete each level!
Easy controls and smooth gameplay make it accessible for players of all ages . Each level brings a new challenge – find the smartest moves, use boosters, and unlock powerful combos!

title: Panda Shop Simulator
description: Do you love shopping at supermarkets? Now you can build your own! Play as a cute panda owner and grow your store from a small corner shop to a bustling retail empire. Earn money to hire assistants and upgrade facilities to the max level. Enjoy playful twist with adorable panda characters that make running your shop even more fun and exciting!

title: Lava Ladder Leap
description:
Lava Ladder Leap: A thrilling endless runner where players climb a castle tower escaping rising lava. Dodge traps and compete against friends in single or 2player local multiplayer modes. Survive as long as possible or be the last one standing.

Game Modes:
Single-Player: In this mode, players must survive for as long as possible.

Two-Player: This competitive mode pits two players against each other. The first player to fall into the lava loses, and the remaining player emerges victorious.

title: Queen of Mahjong
description:
Plunge into the atmosphere of a magical world in a new game in the style of Mahjong Connect. Discover several worlds of objects by finding identical pairs of different items!

Queen of Mahjong is an amazing game that will give you moments of pleasure.

title: Merge Car Defense
description:
Prepare to battle wave upon wave of relentless enemies as you skilfully merge and upgrade the defences of your cars.

Build out a roster of cars and use them tactically in order to defeat the enemy, collect coins and be victorious!

title: Brick Breaker Chipi Chipi Chapa Chapa Cat
description:
Break bricks, collect power-ups for more fun breaking bricks and watch Chipy Chipy Chipa Cat and El Primo Bara Bere dancing. Go through interesting and exciting levels in the fun game about Chippy Chippy Chippy Chappa Chappa Cat and El Primo.
Pass levels of different difficulty and set a personal record.

title: Car Factory For Kids
description: Build and race your dream car in Car Factory For Kids! This exciting experience combines creativity, assembly, and racing into one fun-packed adventure, making it a perfect pick for young fans of car games for kids. This playful kids car game experience brings together building and racing in a fun and interactive way. Easy controls are perfect for free car game lovers.

title: Good Sort Master: Triple Match
description:
A new game for those who like to put order on the shelf, in the closet, in the refrigerator. Collect identical items in groups of 3 - sort, arrange, tidy!
Connect items three in a row, create coziness! Cleaning has never been so interesting and fun!
A simple and relaxing game for women and men of all ages!

title: Two Stunt Racers
description: Skid the wheel of a stunning sports car through 3 awesome game modes and showcase your driving skills. Customize your car according to your taste and drive in style with the roaring engines. Feel the heat in 2 player mode where you go head to head with your friend in 2 amazing game modes! Are you ready to conquer the stunt city? Prove yourself with Two Stunt Racers!

title: Beat Music Battle
description: Step into the world of Beat Music Battle: 456 Survival, where rhythm meets creativity and fun! This casual music game is perfect for puzzle enthusiasts and party lovers alike.

title: Block Up
description: Block Up Contrast is a minimalist arcade game where you need a moving block upward through an endless series of obstacles. The challenge is to avoid barriers of contrasting colors while collecting points. The game requires precise timing and quick reflexes as the speed increases. With simple yet engaging gameplay, Block Up Contrast offers an addictive experience for players.

title: Zindex
description:
You are in an epidemic-stricken zone. The streets are filled with hordes of hungry zombies, and the survivors have long since abandoned this place. Your only hope for rescue is to repair an abandoned radio tower and call for help.
Explore dangerous locations, scavenge houses, crates, and closets in search of valuable resources. Gather materials to craft weapons, tools, and essential items. Fight zombies in melee combat or use firearms—the choice is yours.

title: The Last Tiger: Tank Simulator
description:
An incredible adventure in the world of tank battles awaits you!
Get ready to immerse yourself in the exciting world of tank battles. In this game, you will take control of one of the most famous tanks of World War II, the Tiger. Your task is to survive and win the fiercest battles.

title: Bubble Merge 2048
description: Welcome to Bubble Merge 2048, where classic 2048 meets exciting bubble-blasting action! Shoot, merge, and blast through puzzles filled with colourful bubbles and challenges. Match numbers and colours, solve brain-teasing puzzles, and smash obstacles as you journey through this one-of-a-kind adventure.

title: Treasure Champion - Chest Capture
description: Dive into the exciting world of stickmen in this exciting team game! Your task is to capture the chest in the center of the field and deliver it to the base together with your team, avoiding traps and tricky moves of your opponents. Each successfully delivered chest brings points, and the dynamics of the game keep you in suspense until the last second.

title: Shelter Security: Gatekeeper Simulator
description: Become the gatekeeper of the most bizarre shelter in a post-apocalyptic world! In this guard simulator, you’ll face chaos, humor, and wild challenges. Inspect documents at the visa center, scan luggage for contraband, and distinguish peaceful residents from prankster mutants and disguised bandits.

title: Prison Master: Escape Journey
description: Prison Master Escape Journey is a thrilling prison escape simulator that challenges your brain and strategic thinking! Trapped inside a high-security prison, you must plan every move carefully and begin an intense adventure toward freedom.

title: Airport Controller
description: Take control in Airport Controller Game! Manage planes, guide safe landings, refuel, repair, and board passengers while handling growing airport traffic. Test your skills in this fast-paced simulation and keep everything running smoothly. Play now!

title: Dice Fusion
description: Dice Fusion is a casual game with puzzle content. The game is easy to understand and use the game mechanism, as well as highly strategic gameplay, colorful vision and with a leisurely background sound, to bring users visual and auditory dual enjoyment, so as to achieve the relaxation of the user's physical and mental needs.

title: Solitaire Klondike - Treasure Island
description:
Set sail on a thrilling pirate adventure! Explore mysterious islands, uncover hidden treasures, and help a fearless heroine escape ruthless villains.
Customize your experience with beautifully illustrated card decks, stunning animations, and magical boosters to tackle challenges.
Relax between games with mesmerizing music and lively animated characters. Dive into a world of adventure, mystery, and enchantment!

title: Madness: Sheriff’s Compound OFFICIAL
description:
Madness: Sheriff's Compound is a thrilling, action-packed survival game where players must navigate a chaotic compound overrun by anarchy and danger. Set in a gritty, lawless frontier, the game pits players against waves of unpredictable enemies, demanding quick reflexes, sharp strategy, and resourceful thinking to survive.

Madness: Sheriff’s Compound OFFICIAL is the one and only authentic game of the Madness series, available on gamedistribution.com and itch

title: Color Mix - Jelly Merge
description: This is an enthralling puzzle game with jellies. Dive into the world of exciting puzzles! Match jellies of the same color to reach new heights and beat high scores. With each level, the challenges get tougher and the fun gets bigger.

title: Cube Combo
description: CubeCombo is a casual puzzle game. In this game, players need to use their wits by moving blocks with numbers, and merge the same blocks together until only one block is left, to complete the challenge. When only one number block is left in the panel or the target number block is synthesized, the current level is passed and a new level is opened.

title: Robbotto
description: Robbotto is an arcade platformer with a retro esthetic. Play alone or with a friend as you travel through the ship defeating all the enemies.

title: Animal in Rails!
description:
An exciting puzzle game about delivering animals to a trader's base

Connect and disconnect railways around the world to help each animal reach its home.

Install, remove, and redirect connections so that wagons can safely connect to the locomotive. But be careful and don't let them collide with each other!

Delay trains by using railway barriers. Change the tracks to redirect the wagons in different directions. Pick up new pets along the way and face even more challenges along the way!

title: Formula Racing Games Car Game
description: Let's Play and Enjoy car driving in all the Formula Race master 3D tracks of the world and become a champion on all the tracks of the world in the Formula Car Racing Game. Formula Car Stunts Games 3D introduces a new offline car racing game for the fans of the Formula Car simulator.

title: Agent Squad
description:
Looking for an engaging casual shooter that’s easy to get the hang of but offers engrossing action and real tactical challenges? 
Agent Squad is a top-down shooting game with intelligent mechanics, loads of cool upgradable guns, and addictive gameplay

title: Kick Loser
description:
Dive into the world of Kick Loser, a puzzle game that challenges your creativity and problem-solving skills. The objective is simple—inflict maximum damage on the stickman hero using a variety of objects. Each object has unique properties, adding a strategic element to your gameplay.
Take aim and deliver powerful drags to send the stickman crashing into objects. Experiment with different angles and forces to achieve the most satisfying results.

title: Valentine's Day Couple Date
description: Experience the charm of Paris in Valentine's Day Couple Date, an amazing couple dress-up game for girls. Start with a picturesque breakfast and help Ellie glam up. Next, keep their fitness streak alive with a couple's workout as you dress them both in fashionable gym outfits and accessories. Later, style Ellie & Ben for a dreamy rooftop dinner. Choose from trendy clothing, accessories, and chic hairstyles to create the perfect romantic ambiance. Stay tuned for a special surprise from Ben.

title: sokoban puzzle game
description: Push the Box game is an addictive and challenging puzzle game. It will help you train your brain. The operation of the game is very simple, move the box pusher by using the four direction buttons: up, down, left and right, push all the boxes to the specified position, the game is considered successful. If you are a fan of matching puzzle games, you will love our game. Keep your brain sharp while relaxing, having fun and relieving stress. Come and enjoy playing this puzzle game!

title: Supermarket Sort: Grocery Game
description: Sharpen your sorting skills, challenge your brain, and race against the clock in each level. With increasingly tricky puzzles and tons of grocery items to sort, the fun never stops!

title: Christmas Blind Box‌
description: This is a Christmas toy blind box opening game! Click the "Open" button to test your luck—can you beat the high score for the number of Christmas toys collected?

title: Wednesday Addams Beauty Salon
description: Get spooky and stylish in Wednesday Addams Beauty Salon, where gothic meets glam in a 3-level makeover game. Treat Wednesday to a facial, apply stunning dark-themed makeup, and finish off with iconic dress-up fashion in her unique style. From skincare to eyeliner, you control every detail of her transformation. Whether you’re a fan of the Addams aesthetic or just love alternative beauty, this salon experience offers a complete glow-up from head to toe.

title: Solitaire Deluxe Edition
description:
Everyone's favorite classic card game is back. And this time, it's even more fancy and awesome!

Feast your eyes on the classic game that has been upgraded to look even better than before. Try your hand once again and see if you can beat it like you used to.

Is it all skill or does luck have some say in the matter? Come play now and let's find out!

title: Jailbreak. Roblox jumper
description: In this thrilling game with a cubic style, the character attempts to escape from prison by progressing through levels, each represented as a separate platform. On each level, you'll need to collect coins that help speed up your escape, but be careful: dangerous traps and obstacles await at every turn. A wrong move or misstep could cost you your life. Navigate through each level, avoid the threats, and move closer to freedom!

title: Max Speed
description: Race shiny sports cars on thrilling 3D tracks full of jumps, stunts, and intense battles. Explore exciting locations with unique challenges, perform daring tricks, upgrade and customize your cars, and test your skills in fast-paced arcade races. Enjoy high-speed action, stunning visuals, and nonstop adrenaline right in your browser.

title: Pet Runner
description: Pet Runner is a fast-paced platformer where your pet runs forward automatically, and you must jump, dodge obstacles, defeat enemies, and collect coins. Play in Endless Mode for infinite fun or tackle unique challenges in Level Mode. Use up to three lives, hit checkpoints, and complete daily challenges to earn coins. Unlock and customize adorable pets in the shop to enhance your adventure. With its exciting gameplay and charming rewards, Pet Runner offers fun for all ages!

title: Rootlings: Secrets of the Depths
description: Dive into Rootlings: Secrets of the Depths, an innovative turn-based game where you guide a root deep into the mysterious underworld. Collect water to survive, avoid hazards, and uncover surprises across exciting levels. Choose from Levels mode for challenges or Endless mode to climb the global leaderboard. Customize your root with stylish hats and enjoy minimalistic graphics and relaxing sounds in this unique underground adventure!

title: Number Master
description:
A number elimination game, connect two numbers that are the same or add up to 10, eliminate them!Relax and match in a peaceful bamboo forest. 

If you enjoy logic puzzles like Sudoku, Merge Numbers, Ten Match, or CrossMath, Panda Match Ten is your perfect nature escape. Train your brain, improve your memory, and boost logic—all with the charm of adorable pandas and soothing bamboo forests.

title: FaceChart
description: Do you dream of creating wild, fabulous looks like your favorite artists on social media? Dive into the enchanting realm of Face Chart! Wondering what a face chart is? It's your chic canvas to plan the next jaw-dropping, glamorous look. Grab a piece of paper and let it be your pocket-sized playground—experiment with new colors you hesitated to wear, pick and mix diverse designs for an endless array of possibilities.

title: Gun Racing
description: Here you cannot just race with other cars, but destroy them with the help of numerous weapons. Improve your riding skills and take first places in tournaments!

title: Mage's Secret
description: Combine monsters and increase your power by thinking every action. You have to meet monsters, complete more than 100 tasks and learn the secret of the magician.

title: Palkovil The Way Home
description: Explore the magical world of Palkovil! Battle monsters, solve puzzles, collect toys, and uncover secrets. Feed pets, defeat bosses, and save the New Year in this festive adventure. Dive into quests and bring the Christmas tree home in this exciting online game!

title: Sneaker Factory!
description: Manage your own sneaker factory in this fast-paced online game! Complete orders, organize sneakers, deliver shipments, and rise through the ranks. Put your speed, strategy, and management skills to the test to become the city’s leading factory!

title: Mahjong Slide Puzzle
description: Experience the thrill of Mahjong puzzles! Strategically match tiles, clear the board, and conquer challenging levels to achieve high scores!

title: Feed the Parrot
description: Hello! In this exciting game you will have to help the cute parrot to fill up on delicious fruit. Combine identical fruit tiles to clear the playing field and open new levels, compete with other players, enjoy the bright pixel art and comfortable puzzle difficulty level.  Each game session offers unique challenges and colorful backgrounds, creating an atmosphere of fun and relaxation - the game is perfect for relaxing after a long day at work.

title: Flag Puzzle Jam: Collect Flags
description: Immerse yourself in Flag Jam, a unique blend of puzzle-solving, flags collecting, and visual ASMR effects! Tap to match banner pieces, watch them glide smoothly into place, and clear the board as you complete each flag. With easy-to-learn mechanics and stunning visual effects, Flag Jam is the perfect game to help you unwind.

title: Fortune's Deck Solitaire
description:
Welcome to Fortune's Deck Solitaire, where ancient Tarot magic meets the timeless thrill of Tripeaks!

Three enchanted towers of fate await your touch - draw from the mystical deck and begin your journey through the arcana.

Inspired by the classic Tripeaks Solitaire, this magical twist invites you to clear the cards, trust your intuition, and let the deck reveal your fortune.

Will you find insight, mystery… or unexpected luck?

title: Match-3: Dream Room
description: Assemble the dream room and show your friends how to transform the space with clever combos! Join Match-3: Dream Room and create your dream room by solving puzzles and enjoying the exciting process of furnishing!

title: Blast Cubes
description: Blast Cubes is an addictive puzzle game where players strategically place cubes on a grid. When cubes align in horizontal or vertical rows, they explode, triggering an exciting chain reaction! After the explosion, characters of the same color as the exploded cube emerge and move towards vehicles of the same color waiting at the top. Once the vehicles are filled, new ones appear, continuing the cycle.

title: Chicken Wild Run
description: Aim for the goal while collecting coins! Tap to change direction left and right. When your stamina runs out, the game is over. Get a kiss from a cute girl and become invincible! In invincible mode, you can bounce off obstacles. If you collect 10 mysterious bottles, the coins on the road will turn into high-scoring diamonds for a certain period of time.

title: Bubble Up
description:
Help BUB, a tiny bubble, fulfill its dream of reaching the blazing sun. Use his bubble friends, BLE, to push BUB past obstacles, rise from the ground to towering buildings, and conquer the skies!

You only need to shoot out BLE by click left mouse, good luck!

title: Find the Ghost Cat
description: Your mission is to track down elusive ghost cats! These sneaky felines are masters of camouflage, blending into their surroundings, fading into transparency, or hiding in shadows. Stay sharp and see if you can find them all!

title: Bubble Around
description: Bubble Around is bubble shooter with a twist. You shoot the bubbles from the inside to the playing field around you. Match 3 or more bubbles to make them pop. Clear all bubbles to complete the level. Each level will be slightly more challenging. Stuck in a level? Use the bomb, rocket or multi color power up. Find out all level shapes!

title: Pyramid Jewels
description:
A fun and colorful puzzle game set in Ancient Egypt. Aim and shoot magical gems to match the same colors and make them disappear. 
Tests your aim and thinking as you clear the board and uncover the secrets of the pyramids.

title: Rift of Hell-Demons War
description:
Hordes of insidious demons are lurking in the hellish catacombs! Can you challenge hundreds of hellish creatures and destroy them all as you descend closer to the citadel?
You have several types of weapons at your disposal and an almost endless supply of ammo along the way!
With each step, collecting gold that falls from enemies, you will become stronger and stronger, strength, speed of movement, arsenal of deadly weapons, armor - all this will depend on your actions.

title: Over the Rainbow
description: Help Alex the Elf return the colors to the rainbow by jumping. Avoid enemies and find power ups to aid you in your quest.

title: Word Scramble - Family Tales
description: Want a distraction from the annoyances of daily life, or is your brain tired of solving exactly the same problems? Welcome to Word Scramble: Family Tales! Train your gray matter by solving word search puzzles and level up your vocabulary! An exciting family adventure, colorful locations and engaging play make this game hard to tear yourself away from. The story of a long-awaited child finally arriving in a family will come to life literally in front of your eyes.

title: Paper.io 2
description:
Conquer as much territory as possible and beat the competition.
A smooth drawing experience!

Use your paper block to steal the area from your online opponents in this game. Capture as much space as possible and try to get the highest score in the lobby. If you move outside your own color, your tail becomes exposed. You will be eliminated when someone manages to catch your tail. So you need to take risks to expand your colored area.

title: Summon Tribe
description: Summon Tribe is a simple merge-and-defense game where you combine identical units to create stronger ones to stop enemies. It’s easy, mostly for passing time, and it also supports idle play.

title: Pirate Noob Apocalypse
description: It's time to enjoy yourself with this Pirate Noob Apocalypse game. A little pirate noob is getting ready to go out and battle many zombies that have arisen to take over the planet and all seafaring vessels. You may have a great time playing this engaging action and shooting game and rising to the position of the greatest pirate around.

title: Geometry Vibes
description: Geometry Vibes is a reaction-based arcade game where you avoid obstacles, traps and spikes that come at you in waves. Your goal in the game is to keep your arrow on the route and take it as far as possible. The game includes a classic mode with levels, a race mode (2-3-4 players) where you can do multiple races, and an endless mode where you can test yourself! Geometry Vibes, where the excitement never ends, invites you to challenge...

title: Dream Pet Hotel
description: Dream Pet Hotel is a charming connect puzzle game with an engaging hotel meta. Match tiles to clear levels, earn rewards, and unlock cozy rooms. Decorate and furnish spaces to create a unique style, then welcome adorable pets to stay in your hotel. Watch your collection grow as you design the perfect home for cats, dogs, pandas, and more. Relaxing, addictive, and fun to play online — build your dream pet hotel today!

title: Words or Die
description:
Build words to survive — think fast or get crushed!

In this fast-paced word survival game, players race to create words from random letters. Each correct word builds a tower under your feet. Fail to spell on time? Lava rises, and you're out!

 - Stay above the lava
 - Show off your vocabulary skills
 - Compete against others in real-time
 - Choose your character and style
 - Only the smartest will survive!

title: Komaru cat
description:
Take care of Komaru the cat! Pet her, feed her, bathe her, and tuck her in for sleep!
Dress her up in stylish looks! Hats, glasses, collars, new fur colors, and more! Experiment and create your own unique cat!
Play the merge mini-game, compete on the leaderboard, and earn coins!
Watch the best video memes with funny moments from her life!
Complete the daily challenges and come back tomorrow, Komaru will miss you!
Try to unlock all achievements! Come and have fun!

title: Ball Eating Simulator
description: Get ready to have a great eating and growing fun under an open sky with cool balls inside different costumes in this great simulator game! Eat as much as balls around and get as much as big in the ball’s arena. Eat others, earn coins, and unlock new skins. Chase after gifts, rotate the lucky spin, or enjoy the everyday gifts to carry your eating simulator experience further. All you want is to become the king of the ball arena with your cool player.

title: Small Wardrobe
description: Small Wardrobe is a casual game designed specifically for cotton dolls. Collect and create beautiful and cute dresses for your cotton dolls, and experience heartwarming and fun stories. The game offers a variety of adorable doll clothes, shoes, and accessories. Let's happily organize and tidy up the doll's wardrobe together!

title: Super Sprunki Clicker
description: Enjoy the Sprunki World in this clicker idle game. Immerse yourself in the beats and music simulation, create the band, and use the rewards to buy new upgrades and features. Break the screen touching the sprunkis, hire automatic clickers, social media features, instruments, and everything to become the Sprunki King.

title: Merge TikTok Gravity Knife
description: This is an addictive elimination merge puzzle game. If you like synthetic elimination games, then this game is for you. They can remove a portion of the weapons that didn't merge, but there's only one free shot. Be careful, you have to score as many points as possible within the time limit, otherwise, you will have to start another game. Now join the challenging world of the game.

title: Blocksss
description:
Blocksss is challenging, exciting and sometimes infuriating minimalist puzzle game. Enjoy the world's most beloved puzzle game for FREE!
Easy to play, and pleasurable game for all ages.

title: Chicken Strike
description: Meet the new exciting third-person shooter - Chicken Strike! Here you will act as a brave chicken who fights with opponents in different conditions. Buy a variety of skins to make your chicken unique. Enjoy jumping like a real chicken. Get ready for intense battles and become a true chicken champion!

title: Link & Color Pictures
description: Link & Color Pictures is a captivating coloring puzzle game where you connect colorful dots to fill in the colors of intricate pictures. Dive into a world of creativity and challenge as you complete all sections of the picture to finish each level.

title: Barry Prison Christmas Adventure
description: Want the craziest Christmas escape adventure ever? Barry Prison Christmas Adventure is an exciting role-playing simulator. Enter chase mode or evade mode. Here, you will play the role of either the hider or the seeker. Select your preferred scenario to begin the challenge. Find a hidden spot to start hiding and evade your pursuers.

title: Extreme Makeover Harley Edition
description: In the Extreme Makeover: Halrely Edition you witness the complete transformation of a famous villain. Are you ready to give it a try? Play it today and give her a full makeover routine, starting with removing the two signature colors in her hair, then dealing with her makeup, manicure, and more. Don't forget to also dress her up in something girly-girl and super-colorful so she can strut her stuff through the streets of Gotham City.

title: Obby vs Zombies
description: Obby vs Zombies is an innovative, fun-filled action game that captivated the gaming world. It challenges players to create mazes of different characters to fend off hordes of incoming zombies. The wide variety of options for attack and defense make this a highly strategic game with lots of replay value.

title: Tiles of the Unexpected 2
description:
Tiles of the Unexpected 2 is a puzzle game with a dark military theme and refined gameplay. Clear groups of tiles, set off chain reactions, and plan each move carefully as the board shifts and collapses. The classic mechanics from Tiles of the Unexpected return with smoother controls and a sharper, more intense style.

The game introduces a new Time Attack mode, where speed and strategy are key. Clear tiles quickly to push back enemy forces and survive as long as possible.

title: Fantasy Math Number
description: Embark on an epic adventure in Fantasy Math Number! Test your math skills in exciting battles against monsters by solving addition, subtraction, and multiplication problems. Every correct answer brings you closer to victory! Power up, defeat enemies, and aim for the highest score in this fun and educational math quest!

title: Battle Tanks Firestorm
description:
This game has incorporated the best of famous tank games. 
You can choose the tank that you like best, or prefer a more powerful version. Go to the levels and defend your base from the enemy. At your disposal are more than 15 types of tanks with various upgrades: armor, upgrades of the first, second and third levels. These improvements will help you gain an advantage over the enemy tank army.

title: Mahjong 3D Match
description: Welcome to the 3D Mahjong adventure! Challenge your mind with speed and precision. Plan your moves, view the board from all angles and remove pieces intelligently. Beat increasingly difficult levels, play offline and relax with immersive music.

title: Road Chase. Shooter Realistic Guns
description:
Shoot the enemies chasing you!
Break away from the chase, your AK47 will help you with this!
Huge selection of realistic weapons
AK47, Minigun, Crossbow, Stationary gun, Machine gun
Destroy motorcycles, ATVs, racing cars, helicopters
Realistic graphics

title: Master Addiction Solitaire
description:
