Challenge yourself and take on this brain teaser of a solitaire game!

Masterfully rearrange the cards so they end up in ascending order, from A to 6

If you need some help, there are hints, undos, and shuffle that you can use

title: Mega Ramps Ultimate Car Races
description: Mega Ramp Car Stunt Game 2024: Race Car Stunts 3D Enjoy our new mega car driving games with beautiful environments and impossible car games. Indulge in the exciting gameplay of mega ramp car by performing impossible stunts with new car games 2024. Master your driving skills as a mature driver in 3D landscapes of Mega Ramps Ultimate Car Races.

title: Unpuzzle Master
description:
Unpuzzle master plan and execute your moves strategically to become the master, navigating through bottlenecks and utilizing “exit” strategies effectively.

Touch the tile to move it in the direction of the tile. Complete each level that really challenges your brain to think sharper.

Choose from a variety of themes and skins to customize your block-puzzle adventure. Each skin not only changes the visual aesthetic but also improves the way you interact with the puzzles, making every move count.

title: Crazy Screw King
description: This is Unscrew All! More than simple matching, swiftly remove screws into same-colored bins. Glass slides down with each success! Release stress, show skill, become the Screw Master!

title: Remove the Evidence
description: You’re not just solving puzzles—you’re covering your tracks! Step into the shoes of a hilariously clumsy criminal mastermind who always gets the job done but never without leaving a trail of chaos behind. Your mission? Clean up your mess before the authorities arrive!

title: K-Pop Hunters Valentine Style
description: K-Pop Hunters Valentine Style brings romance, fashion, and K-pop glamour together in one stylish dress-up experience. Help your favorite K-pop hunters transform their looks for Valentine’s Day with stunning outfits, flawless makeup, and charming accessories.

title: Screw Nuts & Bolts: Wood Solve
description: Embark on a Brain-Twisting Journey with Screw Nuts & Bolts: Wood Solve, an exceptional wood puzzle game about nuts and bolts to test your IQ brain power. For nuts and bolts lovers who likes challenge and innovative gameplay, the right game for you - the ultimate puzzle game - is here.

title: Two Stunt Supercars
description: Skid the wheel of a stunning supercar through 3 awesome game modes and showcase your driving skills. Customize your car according to your taste and drive in style with the roaring engines. Feel the heat in 2 player mode where you go head to head with your friend in 2 amazing game modes! Are you ready to conquer the stunt city? Prove yourself with Two Stunt Racers!

title: Anime Doll - DIY Cosplay Girl
description: Dive into the enchanting world of Anime Doll - DIY Cosplay Girl, where you can live out your fashion dreams and become a master of anime dress-up!

title: Pixel Mini Golf
description:
Mini Golf is a complete game, with 400 different levels, and an addictive system. Have fun exploring the game’s green hills and plains while listening to the birds and enjoying its beautiful views, collect as many coins as possible and try to hit all the holes to achieve the highest score.

Among the game mechanics are levels with: Portals, Boxing Gloves, Cannons, Burners, Impulses, Mill, Sand, Mole Holes, Spikes and Movement Blocks that will help or hinder your game!

title: Nuwpy's Adventure
description:
Nuwpy’s Adventure is a classic pixel-art platformer inspired by retro arcade games!
Help Nuwpy explore colorful worlds, collect coins, jump over enemies, and avoid traps.
Each level offers new challenges, hidden secrets, and a fast-paced journey full of charm and nostalgia.
Dive into the pixel world and enjoy simple yet addictive gameplay!

title: Sum Shuffle
description: Sum Shuffle is a puzzle game where players combine numbers to reach a target sum for each level. With both positive and negative numbers, players must strategically select and merge them. The game offers 50 levels, progressing in difficulty. Early levels are easy for beginners, but the complexity increases to challenge experienced puzzle enthusiasts. With smooth transitions and immersive sound effects, Sum Shuffle delivers an entertaining experience suitable for players of all ages.

title: Unlock the Bolts
description: Unlock the Bolts is a challenging puzzle game where you carefully remove screws to solve mechanical puzzles. Each level tests your logic and precision as you figure out the correct order to unlock the bolts. In special levels, the stakes are even higher—you must free trapped animals by unlocking the right bolts! With satisfying mechanics and engaging challenges, this game will keep you thinking and entertained. Can you master every puzzle and rescue the animals in need?

title: GT Traffic Racer
description: Skid the wheels of 6 awesome cars with insane speed limits and drive them through 3 landscape highways without crashing. Show how well you can steer the wheels of these amazing cars with roaring engines and conquer 3 awesome game modes. Use replenishing nitro to overtake slow cars and drive in speed at all times. Customize and upgrade your cars with the best upgrades and get the most out of all the cars. Are you ready to show your driving skills?

title: Wave Dash : Geometry Arrow
description: Ride the wave in Wave Dash, a rhythm platformer where each tap steers your arrow through tight corridors. Read patterns in waves, time jumps to music, and beat brutal stages. Build routes with the level editor, share creations, unlock icons, chase ranks, and perfect speed runs. Simple controls, fast restarts—pure focus and flow. Inspired by classic geometry platformers, tuned for dash mastery.

title: Space Survivor
description: Jump right into the action, fighting dangerous aliens and executing amazing maneuvers! Sharpen your weapons and skills, you will need them to last as long as possible.

title: Food Sort 3D
description:
In this game, you manage your own food court, sorting various food items into their respective categories. You'll encounter different eateries, from fast-food joints to upscale restaurants, each requiring you to sort items like burgers,
sushi, hotdog, fries, pizza and desserts. The game features colorful graphics and quick, satisfying levels that keep you engaged as you expand your food

title: Popping Candies
description: Match and crush candies to achieve goals in this addictive puzzle game! Swap adjacent candies to form rows of three or more and clear the board. Create special candies like striped, wrapped, or color bombs to enhance your progress. Overcome obstacles like chocolate and blockers while completing each level's unique objectives. Be mindful of your limited moves! Use boosters for extra assistance and advance through challenging levels to unlock new stages.

title: Jewel Miner Quest
description: The dazzling world of gems awaits! Participate in thrilling events within limited moves or time. Solve captivating puzzles, complete fun tasks, and enjoy daily bonuses. Discover many terrific surprises with every move and see how far you can go.

title: Sweetsu Tile Puzzle
description: Sweet Tile Puzzle is a relaxing yet strategic game. Match 3 identical Japanese-themed tiles by drawing them into a limited stack. Clear the board by collecting all tiles while managing space wisely. With each level, challenges grow as the stack shrinks and more tiles appear. Can you master the art of tile matching?

title: Underwater Survival
description:
Dive Into a Mysterious and Beautiful Underwater World
Welcome to an unforgettable underwater survival adventure where exploration, discovery, and survival come together in a stunning ocean environment. Dive deep into a vibrant and mysterious sea filled with hidden secrets, breathtaking visuals, and endless possibilities.

title: Slingshot Chicken
description: Launch your fearless chicken from a slingshot and smash through unstable pig-filled towers in an endlessly fun physics adventure! With infinite levels and constantly evolving challenges, no two runs are ever the same. Perfect your aim, trigger explosive TNT chain reactions, and watch satisfying collapses unfold as you clear every pig before your shots run out. The fun never stops — how far can you go?

title: Obby Draw to Escape
description:
Have a blast in Obby illustrating your way to victory! Play the fun and relaxing casual game Draw to Escape and see if you can overcome the levels' issues using just your creativity.

You may earn money as you go through the levels, and you can earn even more coins when you reach the end of each level for every star you find. Things may vanish or explode and kill you, so be sure to check every level thoroughly.

title: Mineblock Obby
description: Minecraft Obby is an amazing parkour game that you can play totally free! Do your best as you navigate through challenging obstacle courses, avoiding pitfalls and traps along the way. Collect coins scattered throughout each level to buy yourself a new sword and enhance your gameplay experience. With each jump and sprint, you'll improve your skills and push your limits. Dive into the blocky world of Minecraft Obby, avoid obstacles, collect those coins, and most importantly—have fun!

title: ASMR Beauty Superstar
description: Welcome to ASMR Clinic, where relaxation meets rejuvenation! Our superstar guest is receiving expert care for acne-prone skin and rough feet in a serene atmosphere. Our skilled doctors will work their magic, providing personalized attention to detail and soothing care. Customize her look with various hairstyles, makeup looks, and shoes to create a stunning outfit that's uniquely hers. Unwind and express your creativity in this calming and fashionable game.

title: Epic Racing - Descent on Cars
description:
To tear yourself and your neighbor to shreds, but to reach the finish line first is an "Epic Racing - Descent on Cars"!

Epic collisions, a serious fight to the finish line and a million ways to bend and twist metal - that's what awaits you in the game "Epic Racing - Descent on Cars".

Burn rubber and tear metal - the game begins!

title: Magic Christmas Tree Match-3
description: Magic Christmas Tree Match-3 is a free New Year's match-3 game where you'll complete vibrant levels, create combinations of three or more, earn bonuses, and help the heroes decorate the festive town. Solve match-3 puzzles, combine elements, use power-ups, explosions, and super combos to complete tasks faster and advance the story.

title: Seek & Find
description: Dive into a fun puzzle hidden object game with intrigue and excitement in "Seek & Find-Hidden Object Game," where keen eyes and quick wits reign supreme. This scavenger hunt game invites players of all ages to find hidden objects through beautifully crafted scenes, exploring maps and secrets skillfully concealed within. With a blend of charm and challenge, this fun hidden object game is designed to captivate, entertain, and test your observational skills like never before!

title: Merge Combo
description: Immerse yourself in this captivating merge puzzle game! Combine matching blocks to score points and trigger epic combos. The more blocks you merge, the bigger the numbers and combos grow! Test your strategy and aim for the highest score—how large a number can you create?

title: Dino Egg Shooter
description:
Dino Egg Shooter is a fun and addictive puzzle game set in a colorful prehistoric world.
With 100 levels of increasing difficulty, players aim and shoot colorful dino eggs to clear the board. 
Each level presents unique challenges, from tricky formations to limited shots.
Easy controls and charming visuals make Dino Egg Shooter perfect for all ages.
So, get ready

title: Falling Art Ragdoll Simulator
description:
The harder they fall, the more points they get!

Jump in and enjoy the beauty of falling art! Because let’s be honest - there is nothing more satisfying than watching someone hurt themselves in the most dumb and ridiculous way. Especially when that someone is a 3d model with ragdoll physics and you don’t need to feel sorry for it at all!
 
Just enjoy our crazy game, have fun, and stay safe!

title: Mega Jump
description: Mega Jump is a fast-paced vertical arcade game where you leap from platform to platform, collect coins, and dodge hazards as you climb higher. Power-ups, shifting coins, and colorful boost stars keep every ascent exciting. With vibrant visuals and responsive movement, the challenge grows as you push for your highest score without missing a single platform.

title: Pixel Destroyer
description:
Pixel Destroyer is an exciting physics-based arcade puzzle game where your goal is to destroy colorful pixel shapes using bouncing balls.

Dive into a world of pixel destruction! In this game, you’ll need to use your wits and precision. Each level features a unique shape made of pixel blocks. Your objective is to destroy them all using a limited number of shots. The balls follow the laws of physics, bouncing off walls and obstacles, allowing you to reach even the most hard-to-access blocks.

title: Mega Fall Ragdoll Simulator
description: Mega Fall Ragdoll Simulator is a casual game where you unleash chaos by dropping a ragdoll from towering structures to maximize bone-crunching impact. Experience realistic physics as you strategize your way through intricate levels, earning coins to unlock skins and enhance your ragdoll's appearance. Brace yourself for an ultimate destruction experience like no other!

title: Draw War
description: Unleash your creativity in Draw War. This is a wonderful strategy game. Here drawing meets battles. Build a hero lineup, draw your legions, then unleash the power of your army. The numbers show the soldiers summoned. Click to send Shielded Soldiers, Soldiers on Horseback, or Super Beasts.

title: Destruction of Stickman Zombie
description:
Take a weapon and destroy the zombie stickmen! "Destruction of Stick Zombie" is an exciting game in which you will fight against hordes of stickman zombies using your skills and strategies. You have to fight zombies to earn coins and improve your weapons.
You start the game as a regular player, but as you progress in the game, you become more experienced and skilled in combat. The more coins you earn, the more weapons and ammo you can buy.

title: Mermaid Wedding World
description: Mermaid Wedding World is a creative dress-up and decorating game for girls. The princess of the ocean kingdom is getting married to a human and they are going to have a wedding now. You can help prepare the food, set the table, serve the people, and play music. You may help the bride, groom,and other guests to dress up and makeup. You may also decorate the room to your liking.

title: Uncle Bullet 007
description:
Play as Uncle Bullet, a retired spy who’s back in the game to take down rival agents and save the day. Armed with an arsenal of bouncy bullets, you’ll use your wits and quick reflexes to outmaneuver foes and rescue hostages.

Shoot your bullets at walls, ceilings, and floors to make them bounce, ricochet, and curve around corners to hit your targets.

title: The Grench Couple Holiday Dress up
description: Get ready to immerse yourself in a delightful holiday-themed game with The Grench Couple Holiday Dress Up! This unique dress-up game combines festive fun with creative fashion choices, letting you design the perfect holiday outfits for the Grench and his partner. Whether you’re a fan of dressing up games or just love the Grench’s mischievous charm, this game promises a memorable and entertaining experience.

title: Army Fight 3d
description: Begin the nervous army battles in Army Fight 3D. Here you need strategic thinking and quick reflexes.In this fun action battle game, you aim to build a powerful army. Defend your base, and defeat the enemy. Start by creating and upgrading your army.

title: Iconic Halloween Costumes
description: Get ready for a spooky and stylish adventure in Iconic Halloween Costumes! Help three BFFs pick out their perfect Halloween looks, from royal Glinda and Bridgerton-inspired outfits to edgy Beetlejuice vibes and cowgirl-chic styles. Customize their costumes with tops, bottoms, accessories, and makeup to create iconic Halloween outfits. Play now and let the fashion fun begin!

title: Goal Rush
description:
Goal Rush is a fast-paced neon football showdown where precision and quick reflexes lead to victory! Play solo against a challenging AI or compete in thrilling 1v1 battles with a friend.

With dynamic arenas, tricky obstacles, and intense goal-scoring action, every match feels fresh and exciting. Outsmart your opponent, master the controls, and dominate the field in this minimal yet action-packed football experience!

Are you ready to take on the challenge and score the ultimate goal?

title: What a walk
description: Whatawalk! silly walking with wobbly legsWhatawalk! is a highly addictive classical game. Even if you've never heard of it before, play it just once and you'll be hooked.

title: Hitman Sniper
description: Step into the icy chaos of Tundra Sniper, an adrenaline-fueled first-person shooter where precision and speed are your best weapons. Take on the role of an elite sniper tasked with taking down dangerous criminals and restoring peace to the city.

title: Pickle Ball Clash
description: Step into the fast-paced world of Pickle Ball Clash — a thrilling sports game where every match is a battle of skill, speed, and strategy. Customize your character, unlock powerful paddles, and climb the competitive ranks from backyard brawls to pro-level leagues. Whether you're smashing winners or pulling off trick shots, the court is yours to conquer. Are you ready to clash?

title: Colossatron
description:
Take charge of a giant robotic snake and smash through cities with ease as you fight to create the most fearsome weapon of all time.
Unleash the power of Colossatron! A unique combination of Match 3 and Snake gameplay allows you to build a devastating machine by merging colored power ups to create new and more powerful weapons. With thousands of potential combinations, the key to victory lies in mastering the art of building Colossatron to take down formidable bosses.

title: 2048 Match Balls
description: With super simple rules and addictive gameplay, this logic game offers endless fun while challenging your brain. Merge balls and level up. Each merge increases the value of the balls while also changing their color and size. Be smart and dive into a vibrant world of numbers!

title: Eastern Star vs City Style Icon
description: Welcome to the world of style, where the ancient palaces of the East meet the splendor of a modern metropolis! Two beautiful heroines are waiting for you in the game: an oriental beauty with exquisite outfits in the style of an Ottoman fairy tale and a stylish urban fashionista conquering the catwalks of the metropolis. During the game, you will become a fashion stylist and create unique looks for each of the girls. Choose your side in the cultural dispute and make this choice a reality!

title: Frog Knight
description: Frog Bubble your mission is to help a spirited frog pop an array of mischievous bubbles! Using your swift reflexes and strategic skills, you’ll throw your lily pad-shaped projectiles at bubbles to clear each level.

title: Ludo World
description: Experience endless fun with various vibrant environments, where every roll of the dice brings a new challenge. Choose between classic or quick mode, progress along the trophy road, and prove you're the master of the board with every move you make.

title: Zombie Road: Shooter with Destruction
description: Grandpa is eager for adventure again! Survive in a harsh zombie world. This time, Grandpa has to save the world from evil zombies. Zombies can drive and shoot! And Grandpa can destroy evil spirits! Fight the most dangerous mutants. Buy cool guns, find unique attachments, assemble your own unique gun and go into battle! Many locations, go through the whole world, from hot deserts to sea battles!

title: Magic Princess Dress Up Doll
description: Welcome to Magic Princess Dress Up Doll, a casual dress-up game for girl gamers. Have you ever dreamed of becoming a beautiful princess one day? Are you an enthusiast of dressing up fashion dolls? Come join us and realize all your imaginations about fashion design! This is a fashion design game where you can make up your own doll from scratch.

title: Fill The Bottle
description:
Fill The Bottle is a puzzle online game for all ages. The design of the canisters is different at each level, which makes you think about how to get the ball in the limited space without crossing
the line. Test your skill in maneuvering the balls and pass the levels with increasing difficulty.This fun and addictive game will keep you hooked as you come
up with clever ways to place the balls and unlock all the levels!

title: Tile Hexa Sort
description:
Dive into a world of colorful hexagons where every move requires careful planning. Your goal is to stack identical pieces into tall towers without mixing colors. The higher the tower, the more attention and strategic thinking is needed.

With each new level, more colors and towers appear, making move planning even more important. Think ahead to avoid mistakes and maintain order in the colorful chaos.

title: Moscow Metro Driver 3D
Mahjong Triple 3D Tile Match
description: Jump into a fresh and relaxing brain challenge with Mahjong Triple 3D - Tile Match, a fun and addictive match-3 puzzle game that brings the classic mahjong experience into a colorful 3D world! In this game, the tiles are stacked in beautiful 3D shapes. Your goal is simple but satisfying: tap and collect three identical tiles to clear them from the board.

title: Sort And Style: Back To School
description: Step into the world of Sort And Style: Back To School, a fun mix of sorting and dress-up games for girls! Organize messy desks, lockers, wardrobes, and even bento boxes across 9 exciting levels. Then, challenge your creativity in the final dress-up unit where you style your school look with trendy uniforms, shoes, hairstyles, and accessories. Perfect for fans of organizing games, makeover fun, and school fashion challenges!

title: Screw Sort 3D: Screw Puzzle
description: Ready to challenge your mind and intelligence in the Screw Sort 3D: Screw Puzzle. This casual 3D Screw Puzzle game will take you into a world of creativity and puzzle solving fun. Here you need to match the screws of the same color and move them to the correct box. You sort screws by their colors. Keep moving the model to find the corresponding color.

title: Marshmallow Rush
description: Marshmallow Rush is a one-button runner where you tap at the right moment to stack fluffy marshmallows, weave through cute obstacles, and dash to the finish. Build the tallest, sweetest tower you can, snag boosters for extra points, and master the timing to clear tricky layouts. Simple to play, satisfying to perfect—how far can your marshmallow tower go?

title: Imposter Coloring Book
description: Get ready for a colorful twist on the mystery and excitement of the Imposter Coloring Book! Inspired by the thrilling world of imposters, this coloring app lets you bring your favorite characters to life with vibrant colors and unique brush styles. Choose from various brushes, including pastel, watercolor, and pencil, to add a unique touch to each crewmate, imposter, and spaceship scene. Whether you prefer bold colors or a soft pastel look, every coloring page is yours to make unique.

title: Pizza Maker - Cooking Games For Kids
description: Become a pizza master by creating delicious pizzas from scratch with 15 unique recipes. Choose ingredients, slice vegetables, shred cheese, and prepare toppings. Knead and roll the dough, spread the sauce, add toppings, and bake. Once ready, box your pizza for delivery! Fun, engaging, and perfect for kids to develop cooking skills.

title: Real Cars Epic Stunts
description:
Flashy and modified super-sports cars and their drivers are ready for the show in Real Cars Epic Stunts game. Play against time in dozens of different stunt tracks and try to complete the show. Unlock new cars or upgrade your car with the coins and diamonds you collect.

Game Features:

● Realistic car physics and appearance. ( Cars get crushed and smashed )
● Upgradeable cars
● 1 Player and 2 Player modes
● Mega ramps for epic stunts

title: Magical Diary: Paper Dress Up
description: Dress up your paper doll with mystical styles in Magical Diary: Paper Dress Up! ?✨ Get ready to enter a dreamy world where fantasy meets fashion. This isn’t just a dress-up game—it’s your magical escape, where every outfit tells a story and every style reveals a spellbound secret. Whether you're a fashion dreamer, a lover of magic, or a diary keeper at heart, this enchanted adventure is made just for you.

title: Earthquake io
description: Earthquake io is a realistic 3D physics-based disaster simulator in which you take control of the forces of the Earth to destroy cities, destroy buildings and crush all small objects to compete with other players in a fierce battle.

title: TimeWarriors
description:
Lead your army to glory through the ages! Embark on an epic journey through history. From primitive battles of the Stone Age to the futuristic wars of the future — become the greatest commander the world has ever known.

Become a great commander and lead your army to victory! Play “Time Warriors” now!

title: Fruit Match Juicy Puzzle
description: Fruit Match Juicy Puzzle is an irresistibly fun puzzle casual game that bursts with juicy visuals and addictive gameplay! A brilliant combination of puzzle and match mechanics. From the moment you start, you’ll be hooked on its satisfying matching mechanics and clever level design.

title: Knit Rescue
description:
Knit Rescue is an engaging and original puzzle game where you untangle a knitted dragon to save a frightened kitten.

But it’s not enough to simply tap the right spools. You must unlock the correct spools and move them in the right direction to stop the dragon in time.

Plan your moves, follow the arrows, and solve each level using logic and strategy. Knit Rescue is the perfect casual puzzle game for fans of brain games, logic puzzles, and strategy games.

title: Back To School: Uniforms Edition
description: Explore global fashion in Back to School: Uniforms Edition! This fun dress-up game lets you spin the wheel to unlock school uniforms from countries like Japan, the U.S., the U.K., India, France, and South Korea. Customize your character with stylish outfits, accessories, and hairstyles inspired by each culture. Dive into the diversity of school uniforms and become a fashion expert while having fun!

title: Train Master
description: All aboard for an exciting ride in Train Master! Tap and hold to control your train, race through stunning tracks, pick up passengers, and dodge obstacles. Navigate bustling cities and peaceful countryside as you master the tracks, upgrade your train, and become the ultimate conductor. Simple controls, thrilling challenges, and endless fun await. Start your adventure now!

title: G Wagon City Driver
description: Dive into city driving with four game modes. Navigate busy morning streets, managing fuel and realistic traffic. Venture beyond the city to tackle rugged offroad terrain. Stunning morning graphics bring the city and landscapes to life, while unpredictable pedestrians and police chases add excitement. Customize your G-Wagon's look and performance, and enjoy the ride with your loyal dog. Whether evading cops or exploring trails, G-Wagon City Driver offers a thrilling experience.

title: Cat Challenge
description: Meet the game Cat Challenge, where at each level the cat will patiently wait until you drop him a round colored candy disc. To do this, you need to cut the rope on which the candy dangles. But first, think about which side to do this and take into account the items that are on the playing field, they must be used to achieve the goal. The candy is not always directly above the cat, so it needs to be moved somehow.

title: Bounce Dunk Basketball
description: Love basketball? Want to master the art of bouncing and dunking? In Bounce Dunk - Basketball, you must skillfully control the balls bounce to make perfect shots and get high scores. Tap the screen to control the angle and strength of the basketball so that the ball bounces perfectly into the basket. Or destroy enemies, get coins, etc.

title: Happy Jump
description: Bounce into blissful heights with Happy Jump! Guide the cute chicken on its springy pogo to leap skyward amid lush trees and fun obstacles. Smash your personal best, snag stars, and chase trophies in this addictive, one-tap thrill. Endless jumps, soaring scores—pure joy awaits!

title: GT Flying Car Racing
description: GT Flying Car Racing is an exhilarating game where players race high-speed GT cars that can transform into flying machines! Navigate through challenging tracks, perform daring aerial maneuvers, and switch seamlessly between driving and flying modes. Avoid obstacles, compete against rivals, and master both land and air racing to become the ultimate champion!

title: Lambo Traffic Racer
description: Lambo Traffic Racing, you will be playing lambo cars through endless highway. It is a great game for kids and adults. Great fun, great graphics and great lambos to drive .

title: Sandstorm Covert Ops
description: Welcome to Sandstorm Covert Ops. As the leader of an elite team, your mission is to infiltrate a desert region controlled by a deadly terrorist organization. Navigate harsh terrains, gather crucial intelligence, and execute precise strikes to dismantle the enemy network.

title: Extreme Real Car Driving 2025
description: This ultimate car racing 3D lets you experience real car driving simulator like highway racing with its realistic car damage, accurate car driving physics and many other features. Car driver may use steering wheel, accelerator meter or buttons to control the car. Enjoy the best car driving simulator game and drag racing game that has an addictive game play with endless fun. Now you can modify your any sports race cars from garage according to your interest.

title: Dress Princess
description: You will transform into a fashion stylist, creating a unique look for the beautiful princess! The game offers a vast array of gorgeous clothing styles, from sparkling evening gowns to fresh and sweet daily dresses, everything is available. Every piece of clothing is carefully designed, with exquisite details displayed in every detail. ​

title: Sea Lords
description: Set sail for success in Sea Lords - the fun idle tycoon simulation game where you're the master of the seas. Start with a small fishing port and gradually build your global shipping empire! Manage ships, upgrade docks, hire captains, and automate your logistics as you conquer new routes and earn riches - even while you're offline! It's time to prove your skills as the next sea lord! Buy and upgrade ships to boost your delivery speed and cargo capacity.

title: Mahjong Stack
description: Mahjong Stack is a unique tile-matching game featuring realistic 3D mahjong tiles. Unlike classic match-3, blocks appear in stacked piles. Match identical tiles and drag groups of three to the tray to clear. Use boosters to speed up progress. Dive in and enjoy!

title: Goods Triple Match 3D
description: Begin a super satisfying match 3 puzzle challenge. Goods Triple Match 3D is a colorful and addictive casual logic game where all items appear in beautiful and realistic 3D. Your table is filled with tons of cute 3D drinks.

title: Paws & Pals Diner
description:
Welcome to Paws & Pals Diner!

Step into the paws of a diner manager and embark on a delightful 2D adventure where every customer and staff member is an adorable animal! In this charming and whimsical world, you'll manage a bustling diner filled with furry friends, unlock delicious foods, and attract a variety of cute customers.

Are you ready to create the diner of your dreams and make every animal's visit a memorable one?

Join Paws & Pals Diner today!

title: Robot Runner Fight
description: Are you ready for a robotic parkour adventure? Robots run and fight on high-speed parkour platforms!  Youll control a flexible robot that travels through the city of the future. Avoid obstacles, fight enemies, and race to the finish line.

title: Gun Rush
description: Begin an action-packed gun battle runner. Gun Rush is an electrifying arcade game that combines gun merging with platform running. Run forward, avoid obstacles, collect weapons, and blast your way to the finish line with ultimate firepower. Control the direction of your gun, shooting power, ATK speed, and Range to increase its value. Increase your damage by using high-value doors.

title: My City Hospital
description:
My City Hospital is a sophisticated digital doll placement game. Have you ever thought about being a doctor or running a hospital to help others? you can realize your dream without
leaving home. In this game, you run a large hospital with 7 management areas. In this hospital, you can help others deliver babies and take care of babies, examine patients, and help patients
with surgery.

title: Foot Hospital
description: HELP! Doctor, I hurt my feet, ouch! It is so painful!Could you please help me to cure my feet? I know you have the best medical tools here!

title: Hawaii Match 5
description: Escape to the paradise in Hawaii Match 5! Explore dreamlike landscapes while matching exotic fruits and flowers. With over 4000+ levels, complete challenging goals in limited moves by forming rows of five or more symbols. Unlock powerful boosters and combine symbols for explosive bonuses. Discover hidden treasures and let your soul unwind in this captivating island adventure. Play Hawaii Match 5 now and enjoy endless fun!

title: Shop Sorting Xmas
description: Love a well-organized, neatly arranged space? Then Shop Sorting Xmas is the perfect game for you! Step into a delightful Christmas-themed puzzle game where you’ll sort and arrange festive items in a magical Christmas toy shop. In this captivating holiday sorting game, find and match identical toys and Christmas decorations, organizing them on the shelves. Your goal is to gather three identical items together to create a triplet and clear the shelves.

title: Red Stickman vs Craftmans 2
description: Classic platformer with shooting. Stickman got into the world of Minecraft, flooded with zombie people and zombie animals. Help Stickman destroy all the infected, save Eve and get out of this world.

title: Fruitsland: Escape from the Amusement Park
description: Fruitsland: Escape from the Amusement Park is a horror escape adventure where bright amusement park rides hide lurking dangers. Players must solve puzzles, collect items, and uncover clues while evading hostile enemies. Stealth and timing are crucial—explore cautiously, hide when needed, and outsmart the threats to survive and escape. The mix of colorful setting and eerie tension creates a unique, suspenseful experience.

title: SPRUNKI GETS SURGERY
description:
SPRUNKI GETS SURGERY ??

OREN, a genius (but reckless) surgeon, must save PINKI after a brutal facial injury—without anesthesia! As more SPRUNKIS like TUNNER, shot in the head, flood the ER, OREN races against time. But lurking in the shadows is BLACK, ready to turn OREN’s mission into a nightmare. Will OREN save them all, or will BLACK end it in tragedy?

title: On Fire Basketball Shots
description: The gym is packed, and the crowd is roaring! The scoreboard's ticking down, and your team is trailing. The only way to win is to sink blazing basketball shots from the court. You're the star player, but the pressure's on—every shot counts, and the hoop's rim is red-hot, making each attempt trickier!

title: Idle Lunch
description: Idle Lunch is a fun and casual idle game where your mission is to take big bites and earn coins! Start your journey with a simple burger, tapping to take each bite and build your fortune. As you accumulate coins, unlock new delicious foods to keep the fun going, from pizzas to fancy desserts. The more you bite, the more you earn! Invest your coins in powerful upgrades that boost your earnings, allowing you to munch faster and grow your wealth even quicker.

title: Nuts Stack Sort: Nuts & Bolts
description:
Challenging yet relaxing Nuts & Bolts sort puzzle with a unique twist!

Nuts Stack Sort: Nuts & Bolts is a fun and addictive stack sort puzzle game with a unique twist! Strategically sort and match three same color nuts based on box color in this jam puzzles. Every level offers an exciting challenge in this addictive sort colors puzzle game. Test yourself with this amazing brain teaser!

title: Squid Game Memory Card Match
description:
Step into the thrilling world of Squid Game Memory Card Match! Test your memory and focus as you uncover pairs of iconic Squid Game symbols and characters. Can you keep your cool under pressure and match all the cards before time runs out?
Challenge yourself or compete with friends to see who can master the ultimate memory test. With Squid Game Memory Card Match, every flip brings you closer to victory or defeat – can you handle the pressure?

title: Hard Puzzle
description:
Enter a vibrant, calming world of geometry where your goal is to build perfect squares from colorful pieces. Fit the shapes together, unlock new levels, and challenge your logic and spatial skills. Need help? Use a hint to keep going!
? Easy to play, hard to master
? Relaxing visuals
? A quick, fun brain boost anytime
Start puzzling and become a geometry master!

title: Perfect Piano Magic
description: Perfect Piano Magic is a fun casual game. If you are a big fan of Piano Magic games, then this is a game you can't afford to miss! The gameplay of this game is extremely similar to Piano Magic, you need to shoot the blocks with a gun to capture the beat. You have three chances per game, start now and feel the real music when you click the blocks, enjoy the beats, and get ready to experience the delightful music and become a rhythm master!

title: Motorcycle simulator offline
description: Get ready for an exotic stunt master & adventurous high ground city jumper sports bike simulator game.For bike racing fans and motor bike riders this exotic sports bike simulator is a real fun game. Just start your engine and hit the gas of an extreme bike to experience the stunt master thrill of high ground city jumper motorbike racing & enjoy sports bike sound.

title: Mushroom Fever Match 3
description:
Immerse yourself in the magical forest with Mushroom Fever - Match 3! Bright and cheerful mushrooms replace traditional crystals, adding a fresh twist to the classic match-3 genre. This game will bring you hours of thrilling fun and bursts of excitement!

Match groups of three or more mushrooms, complete engaging tasks, and unlock new levels! Each level brings unique puzzles and fresh challenges. The more matches you make, the more points and bonuses you’ll earn!

title: Black Hole: Beauty Makeup
description: Black Hole: Beauty Makeup is a game where the player controls a black hole trying to devour as many objects around it as possible. Eat more, grow more, then create a beauty makeover!  Cool black hole simulator. Absorb different objects. Unlock skins. Do you like black hole and simulators?

title: Lovie Chics Spring Break Fashion
description: Lovie Chics Spring Break Fashion” is your ultimate destination for chic and trendy outfits perfect for the spring break season! Explore our curated collection of vibrant dresses, stylish swimwear, and must-have accessories designed to elevate your style and make a statement wherever you go. Whether you’re hitting the beach, lounging by the pool, or exploring new destinations, we have everything you need to look and feel fabulous all spring break long.

title: Tap Gallery
description:
Tap Gallery is the ultimate puzzle game where you test your brain and tap away blocks to uncover hidden images. 
This iq game challenges your logical thinking and provides satisfying puzzle-solving experiences that relieve anxiety. 
Each tap puzzle is a unique brain teaser designed to engage and entertain, making it one of the most addicting games in the puzzle genre.

title: Worm: Apple Quest
description:
Get Ready for Challenging Puzzles in Worm: Apple Quest!

In this captivating puzzle platformer, guide your worm to the legendary Golden Apple while navigating devious obstacles and perilous chasms. The secret to success? Mastering your worm's growing length.

Every apple you collect makes your worm longer, unlocking new paths - but beware! With greater length comes tougher control. One wrong turn and you might get stuck, ending your run.

title: Chicken Scream Race
description: Get ready for a wacky and challenging voice-controlled adventure in Chicken Scream Race! This unique game brings a hilarious twist to platform racing by letting you control your character with both taps and your voice. Whether you’re clucking quietly or screaming loudly, your chicken responds to the intensity of your sound, making each race a chaotic yet exciting experience.

title: Duet Cats Halloween Cat Music
description: Welcome to Duet Cats Halloween Cat Music, a game feast for 2 players filled with fun and music!Join your friends in this Halloween-inspired game to challenge the cat's music and have fun! With the rhythm of the music, control the cute cat to move. Let them eat more ice cream. You can choose a different musical challenge. You should accurately move to collect ice cream, and get the highest high score!

title: Coloring by Numbers. Pixel Rooms
description: Immerse yourself in a game where the process of coloring becomes truly meditative. Create and decorate houses as a designer. Just touch the screen and the colors will match the numbers in the image. Forget about boring routine - now you are thinking about color combinations. For even more relaxation, a music player has been added.

title: Mecha Duel
description:
Crazy about robot fighting games? Wanna fight robots on the mech arena? This Mecha Duel game will not let you down. Your robot has to defeat real steel enemies in a mech arena. It’s hard to survive.
Upgrade your hero to defeat war robots. Unleash fighting attacks in one-on-one robot battle with simple gameplay.

title: Slide Block Puzzle
description: Slide Block Puzzle is an addictive puzzle game. With no timer or pressure, every move is a calming and satisfying challenge for your brain. Solve color block puzzles, arrange blocks to escape from challenging boxes, a game that provides a fun and satisfying experience.

title: Grill Party
description: Welcome to Grill Party! Step into the exciting world of grilling and become a master at crafting tasty skewers! In Grill Party!, you’ll experience a thrilling match-3 puzzle game where you’ll arrange meats, seafood, and veggies to create perfect combos. Serve up mouthwatering treats and show off your grilling skills!

title: City Gas Station Simulator
description: Ever dreamed of running a bustling gas station? City Gas Station Simulator lets you experience the thrill of managing every detail of your very own station in a fun 3D casual simulator! From fueling cars to running a mini shop, every choice is yours to make. Fun and addictive casual management gameplay. Mix shopping and service for maximum efficiency.

title: Real Car Parking And Stunt
description: Welcome to Real Car Parking And Stunt, a challenging driving simulation game. Here you’ll control a car and put your parking and stunt skills to the test. Choose stunt mode or parking mode, each level challenges you to park your car accurately while performing exciting stunts.

title: Giant Run 3D
description: Giant Run 3D is a boy's free online game. You need to choose the correct doors to gather more people. The more people you collect, the bigger the giant you can merge at the end and the chances of winning will be enlarged. The game will eventually require your people to become a giant so that you can fight to the death with the final boss. Sprint all the way to the finish line to start fighting!

title: Toy Match 3
description: Toy Match 3 is the third sequel to one of our cutest Match 3 puzzle games! Get ready for colorful graphics, fun animations, and a catchy soundtrack. Match adorable toys in over 4,100+ exciting levels and take on Daily Missions and Weekly Challenges! Embark on thrilling quests like the Treasure Hunt for amazing rewards. With tons of extras and surprises, Toy Match 3 is pure puzzle fun. Start playing now for free!

title: Pyramidz
description: Unleash the power of the gods in PyramidZ, a twist on the classic Match-3 genre where you slide entire rows and columns to align sacred hieroglyphs and trigger ancient magic.

title: Halloween Store Sort
description: In Halloween Store Sort, match spooky toys and Halloween decorations by dragging them between shelves. Create sets of three to clear the shelves and reveal hidden ones above or to the sides of the screen. With many levels and increasing difficulty, each level has a time limit, so think fast! Use the shuffle button if you get stuck. Complete all levels to win and become the ultimate Halloween sorting champion!

title: Pixel Path
description:
Pixel Path is a platformer with a non—standard plot.?
Get to the portal at the end of the level to win, but it's not as easy as it might seem... The floor may collapse, the spikes will move on you, and your character will grow to huge sizes. One wrong step and the game is over.❌
You will have to keep your sanity, expect surprises, show a good reaction and most importantly: do not get angry.?
The game also has a table of the best players who completed all levels faster than the rest.

title: Dragon Hunter
description:
Choose your character, roll the dice and go on a fun adventure.
Click on monsters - help the hero survive and defeat the legendary dragons in the clicker RPG Dragon Hunter.
Luck and a strong phone glass will determine the fate of the dragon hunter.

title: Pet Me Maze
description:
Welcome to Pet Me Maze, the most hilarious and addictive maze puzzle game that combines humor, challenge, and adorable pets
Are you ready to test your wits and reflexes in a maze full of surprises, traps, and funny moments

title: Oil Tanker Transport Truck
description: Let's go on to ride with an oil tanker transporter truck across all the continents like the Euro, Asia, and America oil transporter truck game has real features in the Euro and American cargo systems of the fuel truck.

title: Cute cat's adventures
description: An adventure game for girls about a cat, with whom you have to go in search of kittens. Colorful levels await you, filled with traps, obstacles and secrets, as well as dangerous enemies who will try to prevent you from completing your main goal.

title: Just Slap It!
description:
Just Slap It is a fun and lighthearted slap-based game where timing and accuracy are key. Compete in slap battles, perfect your timing, and climb the leaderboard to showcase your skills.

With simple controls and engaging gameplay, challenge yourself to out-slap opponents and rise to the top. Unlock upgrades and enjoy quick, casual fun anytime.

title: Flip It 3D
description: In this fun and challenging puzzle platform game, test your strategic thinking as you navigate through levels where flipping platforms is the key to survival! Goblins and knights have different abilities, and they must be moved carefully across platforms to complete each level. But be careful—characters can only survive a limited number of flips, and platforms can't be flipped if they are occupied!

title: Kings and Queens Match 2
description: Kings and Queens Match 2 is one of the most anticipated Match 3 sequels! This long-awaited second chapter features 2,500+ incredible levels full of magic and adventure. Join Princess Bella on a magical adventure, matching jewels and crowns to uncover hidden treasures. Create powerful boosters like Royal Bombs, hammers, and arrows to clear obstacles and win big. Stunning graphics and an enchanting soundtrack bring the kingdom to life. Get ready for a royal journey full of fun and surprises!

title: Real Driving Simulator
description: Real Driving Simulator is a realistic driving simulation game that lets you fully enjoy the thrill of driving and racing! In this game, you can unblock various vehicles and drive them through cities and tracks. Experience the real feel of being behind the wheel.

title: Nubik Courier An Open World
description: Become a top pizza delivery expert! Race through city streets, dodge obstacles, and switch between vehicles to deliver pizzas on time. Earn money, upgrade your gear, and master exciting challenges. Fast-paced, fun, and addictive—start delivering now!

title: Color Rings Block Puzzle
description: Color Rings Block Puzzle is a fun and addictive mobile game that challenges your problem-solving skills and reflexes. The game is simple to play but difficult to master, making it perfect for both casual and hardcore gamers.

title: Goods Sorting Shopping Master
description: In Goods Sorting Shopping Master, you organize messy goods by moving and matching them into neat groups. It’s a fun puzzle game that combines smart thinking with relaxing gameplay. In the game, you’ll face shelves filled with mixed goods such as drinks, snacks, and daily items. Match and sort three identical items to clear the space and proceed, based on the customer's needs. Manage space carefully to keep sorting.

title: Hero Tower Wars Merge Puzzle
description: Join the exciting world of Hero Tower Wars - Merge Puzzle! Here is filled with tower defense strategy and merging games. Being careful of strategy and quick thinking are important. You'll play as a brave hero, battling enemies in layers of towers by mergers and digital strategies. Each tower has a different number of enemies. Use every number and a stronger sword to defeat enemies.

title: Solve the Cube Wooden Blocks 2D!
description:
• This is a game in which you have to connect wooden blocks! In the game you have a playing area where you must connect blocks to fill the line! Once the line is full, the blocks will disappear, giving you the most
points! Compete with friends or colleagues on the leaderboard! Enjoy your game!

title: Maido
description: Welcome to the Maido Shop! Pull items from the box and merge them together. The more you merge, the better the items become. Do you have what it takes to unlock the final item? Set the right price to sell your goods! If it's too cheap, you lose profit. If it's too expensive, you gain nothing. Start managing your shop now!

title: Word of Fortune
description:
Guess the hidden 5-letter word, solving the clue and using spins of the letter wheel to get hints! You get 3 spins to reveal letters and 2 guesses to solve it. Win and earn your title, or miss, and you’re out! Each day brings a new puzzle, plus extra themed levels to explore.
This game is great for players of all ages, and it's a fun way to spend time and test vocabulary and mental abilities!

title: Monster Slayers
description: Monster Slayers is a single‑player mobile roguelike RPG where you must survive endless waves of monsters all by yourself. Every run is a new chance to build the perfect hero, outplay growing hordes, and prove that one warrior can stand against an entire army.

title: Real Racing 3D
description: Immerse yourself in exciting racing! Play classic cars - step on the gas and win! Win championships and unlock new cars!

title: Bubble classic
description: The goal of the game is not to lose as early as possible and to score as many points as possible. Improve your accuracy thanks to very competent rolling of balls. The more blocks with balls you destroy, the more points you accumulate. Check your results in the world rankings, maybe you are already number 1.

title: Crazy 2248 Link - Matching Puzzle Game
description: 2248 is a classic number merge link matching puzzle game. The player's challenge goal is to merge the number blocks into 1024, 2048, 4096, and finally reach the infinity block!

title: Wild West Match 2: The Gold Rush
description: Wild West Match 2 immerses you in the thrilling Gold Rush era of the Wild West! Match three or more gold nuggets, cowboy hats, horseshoes, and other treasures to earn points and unlock new levels. Use Dynamite to clear obstacles or reveal hidden gold! With hundreds of challenging levels, you’ll dig through the Wild West to find hidden treasures and secrets. Ready to strike it rich? Join the Gold Rush adventure now!

title: Idle Legend
description: Dive into an exciting world! Fight monsters, gather battle energy, unlock bosses, and defeat them to earn coins. Spend coins on upgrades, skins, and pets. Enjoy vibrant cartoon graphics and exciting quests. Start your adventure today!

title: Wordler
description:
It's the same English word guessing game as Hackman I played when I was young.
You are given six chances to guess a word that consists of only five letters.
How many times can you get it right?

title: Big Bad Ape
description: In Big Bad Ape, you will play as an unstoppable giant ape. Join this casual battle and experience the exhilaration of destroying a city! Freed from a lab experiment, this furious monster is now unleashed. As this super monster, your job is to destroy everything.

title: Quest by Country
description: Quest by Country - an engaging game that allows players to identify countries by their flags. This captivating task serves as an educational tool, expanding players' knowledge of the diversity of countries and the symbolism conveyed through their flags.

title: Number Rush
description:
You can absorb smaller or equal numbers while avoiding obstacles.
If you collide with a number bigger than you, it's game over.
Make the largest number possible to break through the wall and get the treasure chest~!

title: Vault Breaker
description: Can you help our furry thief crack open a vault harbouring a hidden secret? Click when the marker crosses the button and unlock the vault now.

title: Mr. Drifter: Car Chase Simulator
description:
Run fast, crash hard, and cheat death — in style.

Race through a chaotic low-poly city as you dodge police, traffic, and total destruction. Use game-changing power-ups like Slow-Mo, Freeze, and EMP Blasts to escape the impossible.

Unlock wild getaway cars
⚡ Grab power-ups mid-chase
 Smash through obstacles & roadblocks
Stylized low-poly world with top-down tilt
Endless cops. Infinite chaos.

One rule: don’t stop. How long can you stay free?

title: Spider Bubu
description: Spider-Bubu swings from wall to wall across the city. Halloween has arrived, and you need to collect all the Halloween candies along with Spider-Bubu. Don’t forget to grab the giant pumpkin too! You must be very careful in the city — sharp spinning blades and pointed spikes are everywhere. Collect all the pumpkins and safely reach the portal that appears in the city.

title: Wire Connect
description:
Captivating puzzle game where your task is to connect electrical devices to power outlets by drawing conductive paths. But be careful — electricity will flow along your lines, and if it touches water or bystanders, it will cause a short circuit!

Your goal is to find a safe route, avoid all hazards, and complete the level successfully.
Each new puzzle demands focus, logic, and precision. As you progress, the challenges become more complex, with more obstacles, devices, and tricky scenarios.

title: Farm Block Puzzle
description: This is the perfect game to satisfy your craving for a logical tetris-inspired game with a fresh spin on it. The countryside aesthetic will capture your attention with its beautiful graphics and lovely music.

title: Bubble Shooter Legend
description: Enjoy a fun shooting puzzle game in Bubble Shooter Legend. Use your shooting skills in this casual puzzle game. Your goal is to match bubbles of the same color. Make them explode and disappear to complete each level step by step. Match three or more bubbles of the same color by aiming and firing them to explode and eliminate them!

title: Hot & Cold Winter Style
description: Princesses Eliza and Milana are going on winter vacation, but for each of the girls, winter vacation will be special. Eliza lives in snowy regions and loves fluffy fur coats, warm scarves and winter dresses. Milana celebrates her holidays under palm trees and chooses swimsuits, light capes and bright accessories. Players will have to create stylish images, combining the cold shine of snow and the warm glow of the tropics. Help Eliza and Milana become the most fashionable princesses of winter!

title: Space Cleaner
description:
Space Cleaner is a casual space arcade game where you clear dangerous asteroid fields around your spacecraft. Use your mouse to destroy nearby asteroids, earn money, and survive as long as your fuel lasts.

When your fuel runs out, upgrade your ship’s abilities and return to space to continue cleaning the asteroid field. Destroy every asteroid to complete the stage and unlock the next challenge.

title: 21 Cards
description: 21 Cards is a fun and addictive blackjack-style puzzle game where your goal is to reach exactly 21 points in each column. The game combines the thrill of classic card play with a cozy, home-style atmosphere. Place cards wisely, complete columns, and aim for the perfect 21!

title: Backgammon Deluxe Edition
description:
Want to try a different kind of game of luck? Enjoy the best board game of luck, Backgammon Deluxe!

Challenge your friend to a game of chance and trust in the dice roll. Roll the dice with all your might and pray for a lucky number!

Who will come out on top in the end? Play now, and let's find out!

title: Savage Defenders
description: A tower defense strategy action game where you become the last hope of a tribe living at the foot of an ancient volcano. When an asteroid with an alien threat falls to the planet, you must combine magic, tactics and the strength of warriors to stop the invader who is devouring all life.

title: GTA Car Rush
description: Rev up your engines and dive into the thrilling world of GTA Car Rush, a super fun and free-to-play car chase online game perfect for kids! In this exhilarating adventure, your mission is to collect all the money scattered across each level to unlock new and exciting challenges.

title: Dragon Egg
description: Players can unlock higher-level Divine Dragon eggs by moving three or more of them. Supports multi-level recursive synthesis of 5-color dragon eggs. Eventually, unlocking high-level dragon eggs can unlock the birth of new dragons, accompanied by splendid animations, filling the sense of achievement to the fullest.

title: Frog.io
description: Frog io is a 2D PvP game where players control frogs battling for dominance. Use your frog's tongue to devour other players and grow bigger and stronger! As you explore the map, eat fruits and enemy frogs to boost your size and power. But beware other players are after you too! Outsmart them, grow massive, and become the top frog in this dynamic and competitive io game.

title: Monster Slayer Merge & Survive
description: Welcome to our thrilling adventure game! Your journey consists of two main parts: merging items and exploring dungeons. Embark on this epic journey, combine powerful items, and conquer the depths of the dungeon!

title: Escape Ancient Egypt
description:
a 3D puzzle game in the mysterious ruins of the ancient Egypt, on the footsteps of Cleopatra and the pharaohs.
Can you escape from the pharaoh's curse? Solve the puzzles and unlock the next room, turn on the brain, you'll need it to open all the doors that will allow you to escape.

title: Dinosaurs vs Asteroids
description: Giant asteroids are crashing down on Earth. But the dinosaurs have a plan! They have special mounts on their backs where you can attach a variety of weapons: from miniguns and flamethrowers to alien shotguns and blasters. Additionally, there are special species of dinosaurs that can shoot powerful spikes or break asteroids with their claws.

title: Mega Ramp Bike Racing Tracks
description: Are you a real bike driver? Get this moto racing simulator from the bike simulator games and prove yourself as the best bike rider. Show your bike racing skills on the ramp in this unique bike driving game. It is the No.1 bike game from the free motorcycle games. Perform dangerous stunts on high sky impossible tracks and drive bike on crazy impossible tracks. Control the motorcycle in city superhero motorbike racer to become the ultimate bike rider.

title: Shanghai Chef
description:
A fun and fast-paced matching game where you need to find and connect the same blocks! 
Test your reflexes and observation skills as you quickly spot matching pairs. 
Can your hands move faster than your eyes can track? 
Pay close attention to which blocks can be linked together and clear the board as fast as possible!

title: Art Salon
description: Welcome to Art Salon - Makeup & Nails, where your creativity knows no bounds! ? Whether you're passionate about fashion, beauty care, or just looking for a fun, relaxing game, this is the perfect app for you. From designing acrylic nails to creating stunning makeup looks, step into a world of endless beauty transformations in 3D! ??

title: Rainbow Friends. Survival
description:
A fun and dangerous game about Rainbow Friends!
You are in a dangerous place. You need to survive 5 days and 5 nights, but the deadly obstacle will be the terrifying and bloodthirsty monsters Rainbow Friends!
Complete all the missions, move fast, perform actions carefully and run away from the monstrous monsters!

title: Phantom thief Cat Running
description: Avoid obstacles and reach the goal! Tap to change direction, and the game ends when your stamina reaches zero. Pick up items to increase your score or restore stamina. Collect three stars to enter Invincible Mode. Fish bones reduce stamina, but collecting ten turns coins into high-scoring diamonds for a short time!

title: Spiderlox Theme Park Battle
description: Join a creative and action sandbox adventure in Spiderlox Theme Park Battle! You'll play the role of a superhero Spiderman. Explore a huge theme park. Begin an exciting fight. In the game, you will face many enemies. Use your agility and strategy to win.

title: Tony Archer
description:
Evil hooligans have caught your friends, free them quickly and punish the villains!
You are the great Tony Archer, a dude who masterfully handles all types of weapons, can run fast and is a former military man! In his hands, even a stick becomes a deadly weapon! And Tony Archer knows how to stealthily eliminate enemies. Every villain in this city will be punished and all the main character's friends will be saved! Fight on city rooftops, secret laboratories and enemy military complexes.

title: Army Defence Dino Shoot
description: Army Defence Dino Shoot is a third-person defense idle game. It seems that a lot of dinosaurs surround you. To protect the base from incoming dinosaurs, you can summon more soldiers and engineers to create a defensive line. Don't forget to upgrade your weapons, damage, and fire rate skills. The longer you hold this position, the more dinosaurs you will meet. Have a good time building a military base.

title: Space Craft: Ship War
description:
Explore deep space, piloting a cubic ship that can be infinitely expanded with modules. Collect new decks, melee and ranged weapons, boosters, and rare upgrades on the map, transforming your ship into a true battle station. Enemies also grow, making every encounter a dynamic battle for survival.

Complete levels, upgrade your stats, unlock new skins, and experiment with builds. Vibrant 3D graphics, rich effects, and constant progression make space battles exciting and unpredictable.

title: Day of Atrocity
description: Day of Atrocity is a voxel action game where you play as the hero, battling a relentless swarm of enemies that spawn at an increasing pace. Your objective is to stop them from overtaking the map by wiping them out before they dominate the entire space.

title: Fitness Club 3D
description: Fitness Club 3D is a casual game where you plunge into the world of fitness and make every workout count as you strive to build an empire. Help your clients achieve their dream bodies and fitness aspirations while transforming your studio into the ultimate gym. Jump into the aerobics class, making a splash to rake in the cash. Pay close attention to your clients' forms, ensuring proper training techniques.

title: ASMR Makeover & Makeup Studio
description: Get ready to dive into the world of beauty and creativity! ASMR Makeup & Makeover Studio offers an incredible opportunity to give your virtual model a stunning makeover. This isn't just any makeover game — it's an immersive experience that combines relaxation and excitement through the power of ASMR!

title: Battle Simulator - Sandbox
description:
You can play against the provided levels or create your own battle.

Victory depends only on the best strategy! With the most accurate placement of your army, you will achieve the best results!

title: From Nerd to Popular Ballerina Cappuccina
description:
From Nerd to Popular: Ballerina Cappuccina is a makeover and dress-up game that follows a sweet transformation story. Ballerina Cappuccina starts as a shy, awkward girl with big dreams—and it’s your job to help her glow up and become the confident ballerina she’s meant to be.

Style her through each stage with fabulous outfits, stylish hairstyles, and elegant accessories. As you dress her up, she slowly sheds her insecurities and gains the charm and confidence needed to shine on stage.

title: Animal Merge Zoo Park
description:
Animal Merge Zoo Park is a fun and addictive idle zoo simulation game where you build, manage, and expand your very own wildlife empire. Start with a small zoo and grow it into a world filled with animals, wild beasts, dinosaurs, monsters, and magical creatures like unicorns. Become the ultimate zoo tycoon by merging creatures, caring for animals, producing food, managing visitors, and unlocking new zones.
Merge Animals and Discover New Species

title: Love Tile Trio
description: Welcome to the Valentine's Day tile matching game! Your mission is to match and clear tiles from the board. Tap a tile and move it to an empty space or a spot with a matching tile. If no matches are available or there's no room, you'll need to try again. With a countdown timer and tricky puzzles, can you beat the Love Tile challenge?

title: Royal puzzle Burst
description: Tap blocks of the same color to make them burst and eliminate attacking blobs! Enjoy a straightforward and gratifying game with intuitive controls.

title: Bubble Ball
description: Bubble Ball is an untimed bubble-popping strategy game with a classic interface and arcade special effects noises. The player uses an arrow shooter to pop clusters of three or more matching bubbles to earn points and special gifts.

title: Sniper 3D Zombie
description: Defend your position from the zombie invasion. You have a sniper rifle, find and eliminate zombies. Hitting a zombie is not difficult, it is much more difficult to detect it. The enemies are cunning and very well disguised, they are able to blend in with the environment. Shoot the zombies and take the first places in the leaderboard!

title: Make Two
description:
In Make Two, your job is simple. Give each customer two of the same food! Drag the matching items to the hungry customers before time runs out.

- Beat the clock to clear each level
- Match food pairs to fulfill orders
- Earn coins for every satisfied customer. The more you serve, the more you earn!
- Use your coins to unlock new cute customers.

Fast-paced, satisfying, and easy to pick up. Make Two is the perfect bite-sized game to test your reflexes and memory.

title: Girlfriend from Hell
description:
Girlfriend From Hell is an addictive and fun 2D arcade puzzle game. The main goal of the game is the girl's revenge on her lover. The heroine needs to find objects and use them to make her boyfriend's life hell.  
You need to collect various items to make a trap with them.

title: Stickman Halloween Survive
description:
Now that Halloween is here, the gloomiest day of the year, it's time to bring back the courageous white stickman who is an expert at vanquishing monsters. Stop procrastinating and start enjoying Stickman Halloween Survive right now on your preferred mobile device. It's a fun and free online game. 
Every living thing on Earth is frightened to death when monsters emerge from their underground lairs on Halloween night.

title: Fun Sorting Through The Shelves
description: Unwind with this charming match-3 puzzle game! Spot matching items, place them neatly on shelves, and merge triplets to free up space. Collect treasures, decorate, and design your own cozy virtual nook in a relaxing experience for all ages.

title: Block Puzzle Travel
description:
The goal of the game is to destroy as many blocks as possible. By doing so, you will earn points for completing the game perfectly.
By solving puzzles, you train your attention, thought processes and brain.
In this game you have to achieve the maximum result, and pass all levels.

title: HexaMatch
description:
HexaMatch – The Ultimate Number Puzzle!
Swipe and sort tiles into the empty slot to solve addictive hexa puzzles. With progressive difficulty, unique gameplay, and a fresh twist on classic number games, HexaMatch is perfect for all ages. Train your brain, relax your mind, and enjoy endless fun with this simple yet challenging merge hexa puzzle!

title: Ancient Wars: Caesar
description: Ancient Wars: Caesar is an exciting strategy game in which you lead an army and fight for supremacy on the battlefield. The game takes you to the world of epic battles where tactics, planning and proper utilization of resources are important. Control various units, including warriors, archers and generals, to destroy enemy troops and destroy their base.

title: Delivery Chaos
description: Delivery Chaos is a fast-paced driving game where explosions turn every delivery into a challenge! Navigate through explosive mayhem, collecting waypoints to rack up coins and boost your score. Outmaneuver destruction, and unlock powerful new vehicles and exciting map areas. Can you survive the chaos and become the ultimate delivery driver?

title: Zombie Survival
description: Play the nervous zombie adventure in Zombie Survival. Explore a dangerous world occupied by zombies. Collect various weapons to attack zombies. Move smartly and set traps to defend yourself from massive zombie waves. Explore abandoned cities, dark alleys, and creepy forests - each level is a new adventure! Challenge big zombie bosses and prove your survival skills under pressure! Collect many useful items to fix your broken tools.

title: Miracle Mahjong
description: The panda has a challenge for you. You will face five tests on your way to the top. Attempt to finish all stages and earn the honor of being a Mahjong master.

title: Robot Terminator T Rex
description: Ready for an adventure in Robot Terminator T-Rex! Enter the wonderful world where robot dinosaurs and zombies collide in a nervous battle. You'll control a terrifying robotic T-Rex, equipped with powerful weapons and amazing abilities.

title: Find the Sprunki
description: Find out the hidden Sprunki in the specified images. Each level has 12 hidden Sprunki. There are 12 levels in total. The time is limited so be fast and find all hidden objects before time runs out. Clicking in the wrong place several times reduces the time by an additional 5 seconds. So, if you are ready, start the game and have fun!

title: GTA: Grand Vegas Crime
description: Grand Vegas Crime is an open-world action game set in a sprawling city inspired by Las Vegas. Players take on the role of a daring gangster looking to rise through the criminal underworld. The game offers intense missions, thrilling car chases, and fierce shootouts against rival gangs and law enforcement. Grand Vegas Crime delivers an adrenaline-pumping experience filled with crime, action, and adventure.

title: Hide Ball
description: Hide Ball is an addictive puzzle game where your mission is to protect the red ball from dangerous spiky enemies. Use the given blocks to build a safe shelter and hide the ball. Each level brings a new challenge — the constructions become trickier, and the enemies more relentless. Plan your moves, create a solid defense, and save your little hero!

title: Relay Race
description: Relay race game is an engaging and addictive game that combines puzzle solving elements, casual gameplay and exciting race challenges. This game offers players a unique combination of fun puzzles and trolls for a thrilling and engaging gaming experience.

title: Relax Mini Games Collection
description: This is a collection of creative and fun mini-games. The game contains a variety of modes, you can DIY ice cream, have cooking for mooncakes, design a car of your favorite, and so on. You cant miss our game if you want to find some relaxation in your busy life.

title: Merge Master
description: A casual mobile game centered around matching and elimination. The game features vibrant colors, coupled with a visual style rich in beach elements. With background music and sound effects reminiscent of leisurely walks along the beach, it creates a relaxed beach-strolling environment that immerses players in an auditory experience.

title: Word Cross
description:
Word Cross is an excellent way to loosen up and relax your mind.
Find as many hidden words as you can and improve your vocabulary everyday!

Word Cross combines classic crossword with a modern twist, offering hours of fun and brain-boosting challenges.

► Features:
     ◆ 6000+ challenging levels.
     ◆ Well designed grass & wooden theme.
     ◆ Dictionary: Expand your vocabulary!
     ◆ Hint and other boosters: magnifying glasses, firecrackers.
     ◆ No time limit, no pressure.

title: Bubble Escape
description: Navigate the bubbles to the exit without getting popped by the spikes. More the bubbles escape, more the scores you get. Play through 30 levels. Be careful with the bubble jiggles.

title: Stickman Kombat 2D
description: Adrenaline unleashed! Rage, speed, and chaos collide in explosive 2D battles. Feel every hit — and dive into the madness. Are you ready?

title: Connect Balls New Year Puzzles!
description: ● This New Year's game is more difficult than it might seem ?! You have a playing field? on which you need to throw balls and connect the same ones??! Until you get the biggest and most beautiful one?! Save up points?! Compete with friends and colleagues to become the best?! Enjoy your game?!

title: Glitch
description:
Glitch is a 2D platformer game where you must solve challenging puzzles to overcome the glitching platform and reach the finish door. Get ready for a gaming experience like no other, whether you’re a fan of puzzles, action, or platformers. Start your adventure!

Innovative Puzzle Mechanics: Tackle a range of puzzles designed to test your problem-solving abilities. Each level offers a unique brain teaser, from classic logic challenges to cutting-edge new mechanics.

title: Extreme Car Driving Simulator
description: Extreme Car Driving Simulator is recommended as a hard-core car driving simulation game. Under a 3D realistic game engine, you can play 4 different game modes to test your driving skills. In the Open World Mode, you can get missions on the road to transport passengers. In the Parking Mode, you can park the car in extremely difficult environments. I hope you have enough confidence to challenge them and buy another 6 better cars.

title: Limited Kaboom
description:
Use your buddies to take down the enemy structures and the enemies along with them! 
Can you make survive the hero? 
Use the physics of the world to skillfully take down Sam's enemies!

title: Clash Crowd Game
description: Clash Crowd Game is an addictive arcade runner game where you tap to run, survive obstacles, and reach the destination. Control your crowd, avoid traps, and face thrilling challenges in every level. Easy controls, engaging gameplay, and colorful 3D graphics make this game perfect for quick fun. Run smart, grow your crowd, and prove your survival skills.

title: Hero Fight Clash
description: A thrilling adventure, hearty duel, don't you want to play a horizontal fighting game like Hero Fight Clash? Various cool skills, choose your favorite hero, keep adventuring, keep upgrading, and defeat more powerful enemies.

title: Transformers Battle For The City
description:
In this game you will find an open world where you will defend the city from the invasion of robots. If you are a fan of transformers, then you will definitely like this game. 
In the game you will find 7 full-fledged story tasks, the complexity of which will gradually increase. After receiving the task, you will go to the place of military operations, where you can use various super-techniques to destroy powerful robot villains.

title: Single Stroke Line Draw
description:
Single Stroke Draw Line is a puzzle game with with one touch line drawing. It is required for you to draw one line to connect all the points without any route repetition.
- The rule is very simple, Draw given figures with only one touch.
- Explore amazing levels of this puzzle at your fingertips and sharpen your brain IQ & skills.
- Game level starts with very easy levels and increases in difficultly as you progress in the game.

title: Digger Fighter in the Maze
description: Digger Fighter in the Maze is an action-packed adventure game that takes you deep into a mysterious underground labyrinth filled with secrets, dangers, and treasures. Step into the shoes of a brave digger fighter as you tunnel your way through winding mazes, uncover hidden paths, and gather valuable resources. Along the way, you'll meet and recruit powerful allies, each with unique abilities that can help you overcome obstacles and defeat fierce enemies.

title: Block Puzzle King
description: Smart Puzzle Block is a classic elimination game. Its adorable graphics prevent eye strain, and varied level difficulties keep it engaging. The game maintains freshness while offering abundant props for players to strategically use.

title: Donne's Spinning World
description:
In this 2D puzzle-platformer, you can spin the entire world using magical leaves. Rotating the world changes gravity and helps you reach new paths.

The goal is to collect all the flowers in each level.
Along the way, you'll need to push boxes, open doors, and avoid spikes and silly monsters.

Jump, rotate, and solve puzzles in a colorful world full of fun challenges!

title: Save little red hood
description:
Match-3 puzzles combined with physics-based gameplay: eliminate blocks to make stones fall and become Little Red Riding Hood's weapons, which she then uses to attack the wolf.
Plan your elimination route carefully, utilizing gravity to make the stones fall and become weapons—that's the ultimate goal. Various power-ups can also help you.

title: Shopaholic Black Friday
description: Experience fashion fun like never before with the Shopaholic Black Friday game! Navigate through makeup products, and indulge in chic fashion pieces.
