Hit the mall, shop as many items as you can before the time runs out, and then return for another styling adventure. Explore an array of lipstick hues, experiment with smoky eyes, or go for colorful shadows, and browse through fashionable dresses, trendy tops, and stylish shoes. Complete the look with dazzling accessories and designer bags.

title: Grandma with machine-gun: Apocalypsis
description:
Granny is in a hurry to get home and bake some pies. But there's one problem - first she needs to bake a few hundred zombies! They'll be chasing you in cars and motorcycles, they'll have machine guns, rocket launchers, and support drones.
But you've got a pretty good arsenal too - from a revolver and machine guns to a minigun and a bazooka.
Help Granny get home, roast them all!

title: Hydraulic Press 2D ASMR
description: You have in your hands a terrifying power that gives you the ability to grind dozens of objects! A very effective stress reliever. Try out your personal hydraulic press right now and start destroying all objects! Crush, crush, break!

title: Dear Island
description:
Collect two blocks that match the color of the Match Slot to clear them!
Clear them all to finish the stage!
Blocks of different colors can be placed in the Stock.
If the Stock gets full, it’s game over!

title: Butterfly Kyodai Rainbow
description: Play Butterfly Kyodai Rainbow – a relaxing and colorful butterfly-matching puzzle game with fresh mechanics and vibrant rainbow visuals! Enjoy hundreds of exciting levels, earn daily rewards, take part in special events, and unlock beautiful new wings. A fun Mahjong-style connect game for all ages – no download required!

title: Fashion Stylist Salon Makeover
description: Do you want to create your own fashion styles? Join our best hair salon simulator game and enjoy the utmost fun. You will act as a fashion stylist who does haircuts, hairstyling, and skin care. Welcome customers with different requirements and use your hairstyling skills to make them satisfied and happy!

title: Color Cocktail
description: Clients are waiting for drinks from you, quickly prepare drinks for clients and collect points. Combine identical balls to get new fruits. Come on, everyone is waiting for you!

title: Dynamons Connect
description:
Dive into the exciting world of Dynamons Connect! This fun and engaging game with adorable, colorful characters helps improve focus and visual perception.
Match identical tiles by connecting them with a path that has no more than two turns to clear the board. With endless levels, the challenge never stops!

title: Brainrot Boing Boing Merge
description:
Welcome to Brainrot Boing Boing Merge – a charming merge puzzle game where adorable creatures meet polished gameplay and juicy physics!

Merge. Match. Maximize
Satisfying Effects & Lively Details
Unlockable Skins System
Relaxing Yet Strategic

If you love satisfying merges, juicy feedback, and charming characters, this game is for you. Play now and see what creature you’ll create next!

title: Tripeaks Solitaire Escapes
description: Play Solitaire TriPeaks Escapes, a relaxing card game with a warm summer vibe. Explore hundreds of unique solitaire levels featuring stunning graphics and vibrant beach landscapes. Master challenging card puzzles using powerful boosters, train your brain and sharpen your strategy. Dive into this colorful TriPeaks world and enjoy a soothing, slow-paced adventure. Escape the daily grind and find your zen in every hand you play!

title: Smart Dots Reloaded
description: Smart Dots Reloaded is a fresh remake of the classic Dots and Boxes puzzle from Windows 3.1. Players take turns drawing lines between dots. Completing a square earns a point, and the game ends when the board is full. Featuring modern visuals, smooth animations, and both AI and two-player modes, this is a strategy game that’s easy to learn but hard to master.

title: Zumba Story
description: Explore every corner of the jungle, create combinations and shoot colorful marbles. With each level, face unique challenges and utilize powerful boosters to enhance your skills. Unlock exciting chapters, conquer obstacles, and experience a vibrant journey full of surprises!

title: Wonders of Egypt Match
description: Begin a legendary journey in Wonders of Egypt Match, a thrilling Match 3 game set in Ancient Egypt! Join your guide, the Amara, as you match three or more gems and artifacts to uncover hidden treasures and secrets buried in pyramids, temples, and obelisks. With stunning visuals and immersive soundscapes, explore a world filled with ancient mysteries and challenges. Ready to prove your skills? Join the adventure and experience the wonders of Egypt today!

title: Stick Boy: Bazooka Ragdoll
description: Unleash chaos in Stick Boy: Bazooka War! Blast through levels with a variety of powerful bazookas, each with unique abilities. Obliterate enemies, destroy bases, and demolish everything in your path. Choose the perfect ammo to send ragdoll foes flying and experience thrilling destruction as you crush their strongholds. Help Stick Boy annihilate all adversaries and conquer every level in this explosive adventure!

title: Slenderman Back to School
description: On a very mysterious night you wake up and find yourself trapped in your high school, a town in Massachusetts, and you will have to survive until dawn and escape from the urban legend Slenderman. In Slenderman Back to School, a 3D online game, you will be able to feel the adrenaline that a horror game feels like.

title: Cyber Monday
description: Cyberpunk Monday thrusts you into a neon-drenched arcade cyberpunk adventure. Hack terminals, dodge digital foes, and race across futuristic CityGrid zones. Look for combos, outsmart AI, and collect cyber credits in this fast-paced hacking runner. Perfect for fans of cyberpunk games, arcade game thrills, free mobile games, and even cool math games that students love. Gear up—your Monday just got cyber.

title: Last War Survival
description: The end is near. The world is no longer peaceful. In this game full of gunfights, zombies, and strategic challenges, you'll battle the evil zombies. Solving number puzzles to unleash your tactical genius. In Last War Survival, you'll play as a survivor in a world ravaged by a zombie virus.

title: Wild Tanks
description:
Wild Tanks includes two game modes.
This is a survival race and tough tank battles.

Compete in tank races with shooting, earn stars, level up the tanker, upgrade your tank.
Take part in epic tank battles and destroy the enemy.

Break, destroy, destroy everything. Drive through the mountains, crush soldiers, blow up the enemy, have fun to the fullest!

title: Sworded.io - Spin and Rub.
description: Test your skills in the game – an arcade simulator of sword fights! Fight waves of enemies, upgrade your character, unlock powerful weapons and magic spells. Demonstrate your tactics and reaction in dynamic battles!

title: Find Objects - Hidden Item
description:
Find objects on colorful maps with links and Easter eggs!
An interesting puzzle casual indie game in the genres of "Hidden Objects" and "Find the Differences"!

Embark on an exciting journey through beautiful 2D locations, where hundreds of hidden objects and riddles await you! Explore picturesque landscapes, mysterious cities and magical worlds to find all the hidden objects. And in the "Spot the Difference" mode, test your attentiveness by comparing two almost identical pictures!

title: Candy Jewels
description: It is a candy-filled puzzle adventure full of surprises! Match candies, break chests and collect coins as you progress through countless levels. Complete fun events like Time Attack or Coin Catch and use boosters to overcome tricky obstacles even faster!

title: Cosmo Puzzle
description: Cosmo Puzzle is a colorful puzzle game about a robot who dreams of collecting a collection of minerals from all over the Solar System.

title: Jewel Garden Story
description: Enter a dazzling realm where sparkling jewels await your matching skills. Challenge yourself to achieve high scores and enjoy the visually stunning jewel combinations. Perfect for puzzle enthusiasts seeking endless entertainment.

title: Doodle Dino Run
description: Doodle Dino Run delivers an addictive running adventure where you control a cute dinosaur, avoid dangers, and push your distance record farther every time you play. Featuring smooth side-scrolling gameplay, precise jump timing is essential to survive. Packed with action, this dinosaur adventure challenges your reflexes as the speed continuously increases.

title: Brilliant Jewels
description: Brilliant Jewels is a Match 3 game where you can either play against the time or try to pass levels with limited amount of moves. If you are feeling confident, you can also challenge the hard mode on the time attack mode. This game doesn't lack any sparkle!

title: Knife Madness
description: Aim, throw and survive! Watch out — avoid hitting other blades. The spinning wheel gets faster, the stakes get higher and only your quick reflexes will keep you in the game. Can you defeat the boss levels and unlock epic knife skins? The challenge is on!

title: Obby Escape: Prison Rat Dance
description: Obby Escape: Prison Rat Dance is an exhilarating adventure game that merges the thrill of intricate prison escape challenges with the dynamic agility required in parkour. Assume the role of a resourceful rat striving to escape the strict surveillance of a heavily fortified prison. Find your way through elaborate mazes and overcome diverse, challenging obstacles as you plot your daring prison escape.

title: Burger Cafe - Cooking Games For Kids
description: Learn to cook burgers and open your own restaurant! Choose a recipe, gather fresh ingredients, chop veggies, prepare signature sauces, bake buns to perfection, and fry juicy patties. Once everything’s ready, assemble your burger masterpiece, package it, and serve happy customers. Customize your restaurant’s look and unlock new recipes as you rise to become a top chef in town. Dive into the burger-making experience and build the best burger joint around!

title: Tap Bead
description: Tap Bead is a relaxing puzzle game. Arrange beads by color to match patterns and clear levels. Simple controls, soft visuals, and many levels make it a soothing, satisfying experience.

title: Doomsday Zombie TD
description: Doomsday Zombie TD is a cool and exciting tower defense game. You aim to defend your castle from brutal enemy attacks and take down the zombie army. Depending on your defense strategy, you can upgrade your buildings, towers, arsenal, and army. Lead your army to defend the castle and kill the zombie hordes. Enjoy!

title: King of Crabs
description: Easy to operate the krab,The Shell Gallery will show each role's armor, speed, skill, and pelt,The Equipment shop sells 5 Claws, 5 Bodies, and 5 Legs, Claim extra claw coins in the Sign and Spin,The Quick Match will make a fight with 24 players.The Ultimate Guide to Winning Tactics and Tips,Find a shell first. Collect and eat fish on the ground to grow up, Attack the weaker opponents.

title: Maze Escape Challenge
description: Maze Escape Challenge is a fast-paced maze game where you must reach the exit as quickly as possible. Each level features a unique labyrinth with increasing difficulty, traps, and surprises. Some levels include Dark Mode, where you can see only a small light around the player. Earn stars by finishing mazes fast (1–3 stars), unlock new levels, beat your best times, and try to master every maze.

title: Sort Resort
description: Unleash your creativity and puzzle-solving skills in this unique game! Your mission: sort colorful liquids into the right flasks while also drawing beautiful pictures. Each level challenges you with tricky sorting tasks, but there's more — as you pour and sort, stunning images will come to life! Enjoy a relaxing yet engaging experience that blends art and logic. Can you master both sorting and drawing? Play now and find out how fun and satisfying it can be!

title: BBQ Sort Puzzle
description:
This is an interesting elimination puzzle game!

You need to put three identical items into the same grill to complete the grilling.

The difficulty of the game increases step by step.

title: Survival Island: EVO
description: Play a fun adventure and simulation game in Survival Island: EVO. You are alone on a mysterious island, and the challenge begins: survive, build, and thrive. Gather more resources like food, water, wood, and stone. And craft the tools you need to stay alive. Build your shelter, light a fire, and protect yourself from hunger and wild animals. Explore hidden corners of the island, discover secrets, and unlock new crafting recipes. Become the true survivor.

title: Tile Sort - Match 3
description: Tile Sort - Match 3 is an addictive match-3 puzzle game where your task is to sort and match identical tiles on the board. The game combines classic match-3 gameplay with elements of sorting, adding an extra layer of strategy and logic. Move tiles, creating combinations of three or more identical tiles to clear the board.

title: Halloween Match Trio
description: Halloween Match Trio is a classic match-3 puzzle game with fun challenges. Swap items to make a line of three or more matching items, horizontally or vertically. Keep matching to unlock all tiles and reach the final stage. Use power-ups like bombs, arrows, magnets, and more to clear levels faster. Complete all 75 levels to win the game!

title: FNF 2 Player
description:
FNF 2 Player allows two players to play at the same time. Players can compete with each other by choosing the characters they want. The difficulty level can be determined by the music, thus appealing to all types of players.

Game Modes: 

- Story Mode: You fight with new characters weekly.
- Freeplay Mode: You can play by choosing the song you want.
- 2 Player Mode: It's time to duel with your friend.

title: Cool Orange Ball: Bounce Adventure
description:
Cool orange ball went on an adventure in which evil stones beat him, but the orange ball has 3 hearts. The game is similar to mario and sonic.

Game Features:
- Lots of exciting levels
- Various biomes
- Secrets in some levels
- Skins of colorful balls

Did you like the game Cool Orange Ball: Bounce Adventure? - Then try our other games and write a review on what to improve or what game we should release next!

title: Nitro Speed Car Racing
description:
Nitro Speed Car Racing is a very unique racing game. You need to focus on the pointer on the dial and stop it at the right moment to get the Nitro that can help you rush to the finish line. This
is a test of your quick reaction ability. Of course, you can use the coins you collected in the game to upgrade your engine and nitro. Come to a brain contest, stimulate your dopamine, and
challenge your reflex limit!

title: Shape Transform Blob Racing
description: Shape Transform: Blob Racing is a casual running game. In this game, you will control a little Blob, running, shape-shifting, and go through various challenges! It would help if you quickly switched the Blob’s shape while running to navigate various obstacles. For example, turning into a ball helps you roll through narrow passages. When you become a square, it helps you cross flat areas more  easily.

title: PopCats: Merge the cats!
description: An incredibly cute game full of purring and cats. You have to connect identical cats to get bigger and bigger fuzzies. Each of them has its own story! Get to know them and connect the two biggest ones to win! Earn points and become the best cat on the leaderboard!

title: Paperly - Paper Plane Adventure
description:
Go on an exciting paper plane flight adventure, learn different flight mechanics & reach your destination.

PAPERLY: PAPER PLANE ADVENTURE - is all about Flying a Paper Plane, learning from previous mistakes, and Heading toward a Better Flight in this Physics-Driven Gameplay.

title: Money Grabber
description: In Money Grabber you collect Money before it goes into the Shredder! Upgrade your machines using cards in this survivor style tower defence game, you can unlock new cards using gems as a gacha mechanic and upgrade your machines using coins!

title: Alien Wreckage 1
description: In "Alien Wreckage - Chapter 1" you are a lone space traveler, who explore the deepspace looking for alien artifacts around the universe. Face alien creatures, collect coins and jewels to spend in the game shops, find all the secrets and unlock new powerups.

title: Hide and Escape from Angry Teacher
description: Dive into the atmosphere of escape with hide and seek in this free online 3d game! Help the hero to escape school! Hide and interact with objects to avoid being seen by the teachers. Get to the school bus by any means necessary to escape!

title: Minecraft Pixel Warfare
description: Minecraft Pixel Warfare" is a fast-paced PvP shooter set in blocky, Minecraft-inspired worlds. Players battle in competitive team modes (e.g., Team Deathmatch, Capture the Flag) or free-for-all arenas using guns, grenades, and melee weapons—all with Minecraft’s iconic pixelated visuals. Unlock skins, upgrade weapons, and master maps to dominate the leaderboard!

title: TearDown - Destruction SandBox
description:
The player is given complete freedom of action. You can explore various locations filled with structures. The main feature of the game is the ability to destroy everything you see.

Have you ever wanted to level a multi-storey house with your own hands? Now you have the opportunity to do just that! The physics of destruction is close to reality. You can use a variety of weapons to destroy objects, from a hammer to a powerful bazooka.

title: Teacher Simulator Christmas Exam
description: Welcome to the funniest and busiest Christmas classroom ever! Teacher Simulator: Christmas Exam is a charming and playful teacher class simulator where you act as a holiday teacher. Manage orders, hand out exam papers, grade tests, etc. Different classes are scheduled on different days of the week, such as art class, geography class, math class, and so on.

title: Cafe Owner Business Simulator
description: Build your dream cafe and become a successful business owner in Cafe Owner: Business Simulator! Restore your dad cafe and turn an abandoned space into a thriving restaurant. This exciting and simulation game lets you experience what it’s like to run your own cafe, from cleaning up to expanding into a successful cafe business.

title: Mini Games Casual Collection
description:
Mini Games: Casual Collection is an online game. The gameplay is simple, fun, and addictive, so
you won't be able to stop playing. There is no stamina display. You can play anytime anywhere. You can use hints to help you pass when you are stuck on a level. If you have any problems playing this game or have any suggestions for this game, please leave us a message. If you like our games, please share them with your friends to double the fun!

title: Winter Solitaire TriPeaks
description:
Take a break from the holiday bustle and unwind with Winter Solitaire TriPeaks!
Play over 500 frosty levels and clear shimmering, ice-covered tableaus. Escape into a peaceful winter wonderland filled with enchanting scenes that evolve as you build magical locations throughout the game. From a cozy cottage to a snow-dusted palace, every setting is a feast for the eyes.

Discover the most heart-warming Solitaire experience of the season — and let the snowflakes guide your cards to victory!

title: Bus Driver Simulator 3D
description:
Bus Driver Simulator 3D is a bus simulator in which you will be able to drive different types of buses traveling around different parts of the world including Los Angeles, Berlin, Rome, Alaska and so on.

Each scenario in Bus Driver Simulator 3D has special characteristics. So, for example, in Alaska you will be driving on snowy tundra, and other cars will not be very much, but on the city highway in Los Angeles the traffic will be more intense.

title: Stunt Bike Rider Bros
description: Stunt Bike Rider Bros is a motorcycle racing and show game that you can play in both 1 player and 2 player mode with your friend. There are 3 different game modes in the game. In the "Racing Mode", you can compete with both your friend and other motorcycle drivers. In the "Career Mode", try to complete the difficult stages in a limited time. In the "Open World", you can earn coins and diamonds by performing various stunts with your motorcycles.

title: Childcare Master Online
description: Get ready to become a parenting superstar in Childcare Master Online! This wonderful casual simulation game is all about playing the role of a top parenting expert. As soon as you start the game, you'll find yourself in a lively daycare center with adorable kids. What's your mission? Give them love and care! First, you need to create a warm environment.

title: Sword and Jewel
description: Sword and Jewel is a fun and addictive match-3 puzzle game where you place colorful gems on the board to create lines of three or more. Match gems in rows or columns to clear them, score points, and keep the board from filling up. Plan your moves carefully - when there’s no space left for new gems, the game ends!

title: Gun Shooting Range
description: In this game, you are a rookie sniper at the beginning, take your rifle, pass all the missions,and grow into a professional sniper! Remember, shoot every bullet calmly, be accurate and fatal,and use the least bullets to do the biggest damage.

title: Stickman Mega Boss: Battles!
description: Battle hordes of Minecraft mobs! Buy awesome swords and helmets, or unbox them from cases. Take on mega-bosses, unlock different modes, and earn leaderboard points to become the best in this game!

title: Rope King
description: The Rope King is a fun and casual competitive game. In the game, players will control the characters to perform various strange rope skipping challenges. The game is simple and easy to use, the theme is humorous and funny, the game style is exquisite and creative, and it is matched with various funny actions and cool and dynamic sound effects. You will definitely love it.

title: Elemental Gloves Magic Power
description: Elemental Gloves - Magic Power is a superpower arcade game.  Experience the fun of superpowers in magic games? Fascinated by elemental games? In this game, you can use the superpowers in the magic gloves to fight with your enemies. Shooting with flames, attacking with lightning, and attacking with electromagnetic waves, are three ways for you to choose. Don't hesitate to take the opportunity to practice real elemental magic and wipe out the bad guys. Become the greatest elemental master!

title: Hex Planet Idle
description: Hex Planet Idle is both an RPG adventure game and a survival idle game with 3D models. You can control a stickman warrior to discover the whole universe by collecting resources and unlocking new areas. When you step on the white lighting areas, you will know the resource request of the next area. Get close to any items to collect them automatically. If I were you, I would unlock all areas because of the plentiful resources.

title: Airways Maze
description:
This is an Airway game. You have to create the path/airway to move the plane from left to right without colliding any blocks. When you complete the level then unlock the next level. You have 100 levels now. But I will add more levels every 100 downloads.
Enjoy!

title: Call of the Jungle! Animal Evolution
description:
Feel like the king of the jungle in this casual 3D runner about wild animals. Feed your hungry pet only the right food so that it develops. Collect crystals, level up your character and become the king of beasts in this free online game!

Dive into the exciting world of animals, where your pet will become a real king of beasts. In this exciting casual online game, you have to feed your animal so that it can grow and evolve. Go through exciting races and challenges in the wild jungle.

title: Move the rubber bands: Logic puzzle
description:
In this game you need to put the rubber bands in their places.
At the start of the level, rubber bands are scattered across the field. Your task is to move the cutters along the pins and place the cutters on the platforms of the corresponding color.
Your task is to solve logic puzzles. It won't always be easy to come up with a solution. Sometimes you will need to strain your logic and ability to navigate in space.

title: Mini Games Puzzle Collection
description:
Mini Games: Puzzle Collection is an addictive collection of mini games, including 3 of the most popular puzzle games. You need to use limited wooden planks to build a bridge to help doge eat
bones on the other side of the river, draw lines to send donuts to doge. You can also experience the day of a stall owner, satisfying the needs of customers exactly. These fresh and interesting challenges require you to use your brain and solve them one by one through logical thinking.

title: Mr Bullet: Stealth Ninja Killstreak
description: Stealth action about a special agent! Third-person shooter about secret missions. Shootouts with stickmen. Physical destruction! Battles with dangerous Bosses. Tanks, Helicopters, Mutants! Road chases with destructible cars and much more!

title: ASMR Water vs Fire
description:
Water vs Fire, upgrade your water power and damp down the fire!
And Have fun!

Upgrade your Water Power and your Amount of Canister.


- Easy intuitive controls
- Release to shoot

title: Ninja Crossword Challenge
description: It's time to test your vocabulary with Ninja Crossword Challenge, an educational puzzle online game for everyone, and a free game for kids to improve their vocabulary. All you have to do is fill in the words in the grid, the game has more vocabulary than you can imagine, ready to take on my challenge?

title: Super Sniper Missions
description: Are you ready to experience an exciting first-person shooter game, Super Sniper Missions gives you an addictive shooting experience. You travel through various cities as a sniper who upholds the city's justice. Your mission is to kill the criminals within a limited time while keeping the hostages safe. Unlock and collect M74, 98K, and other sniper rifles, join us Save the hostages, and become the army's top sniper!

title: Crazy Bunnies
description: An exciting platformer about super bunnies in which you have to go through levels created in the style of Minecraft. There is a single and cooperative mode.

title: Labuba Halloween Infestation
description: Monsters are invading Halloween! You must destroy them all — the fate of Halloween is in your hands. The game features three different modes, each with tougher and more powerful monsters.

title: Ants Party
description: Welcome to Ants Party — a charming strategy-idle game where your colony's mission is clear: eat it all! On each level, a delicious item appears — from juicy apples to giant cakes — and your ants must devour it completely. Starting from your anthill, they march out, take a bite, and carry the piece back home. The level ends when the entire treat is consumed and hauled away.

title: Fall Bean 2
description: Fall Bean 2 invites you to a colorful, fun-filled world of races! In this chaotic platform game, your goal is to be the last one standing by outmaneuvering other players. Jump, roll, and leave your opponents behind on challenging courses. Overcome new obstacles in each round to reach the final and claim victory! Compete with friends or players from around the world in non-stop action. Join Fall Bean 2 now and enjoy the excitement!

title: Mega Prize Scratch
description: Embark on a fun journey and try your luck with scratch cards. The appearance and value of houses, cars, or animals are in your hands. Win big with the scratchers, complete all the missions, and ensure every story has a happy ending.
